config.script:
'enum2str #include "50100" #include "50203" 'eTypRejestru2Str #include "50517" 'messagebox #include "50122"
class CNAVOFirmaImportOptions public m_bCustomers public m_bProducts public m_bEmployee public m_bReceipt public m_bSrtrw
public m_bUpdateExisting
public m_bPaymentsBalance public m_dPaymentsBalanceDate
public m_bPayments public m_dPaymentsBeginDate public m_dPaymentsEndDate
public m_bStoreBalance public m_dStoreBalanceDate
public m_bTransactionBalance public m_dTransactionBalanceDate
public m_bStoreOp public m_dStoreOpBeginDate public m_dStoreOpEndDate
public m_bSale public m_dSaleBeginDate public m_dSaleEndDate
public m_bPar public m_dParBeginDate public m_dParEndDate
public m_bPurchase public m_bPurchaseBeginDate public m_bPurchaseEndDate
public m_bCostPurch public m_dCostPurchBeginDate public m_dCostPurchEndDate
public m_bAccountBalance public m_dAccountBalanceDate public m_bAccountBalanceMerge
public m_bAccountOp public m_dAccountOpBeginDate public m_dAccountOpEndDate
public m_bAccounts public m_strAccounts
private Sub Class_Initialize() m_bCustomers = "0" m_bProducts = "0" m_bEmployee = "0" m_bReceipt = "0" m_bSrtrw = "0" m_bUpdateExisting = "1"
m_bPaymentsBalance = "0" m_dPaymentsBalanceDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()
m_bPayments = "0" m_dPaymentsBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() m_dPaymentsEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()
m_bStoreBalance = "0" m_dStoreBalanceDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()
m_bStoreOp = "0" m_dStoreOpBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() m_dStoreOpEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()
m_bSale = "0" m_dSaleBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() m_dSaleEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()
m_bPar = "0" m_dParBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() m_dParEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()
m_bPurchase = "0" m_bPurchaseBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() m_bPurchaseEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()
m_bCostPurch = "0" m_dCostPurchBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() m_dCostPurchEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()
m_bAccountBalance = "0" m_dAccountBalanceDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() m_bAccountBalanceMerge = "1"
m_bAccountOp = "0" m_dAccountOpBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() m_dAccountOpEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()
m_bAccounts = "0" m_strAccounts = ""
m_bTransactionBalance = "0" m_dTransactionBalanceDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() end sub
public function check() check = "" if m_bPaymentsBalance <> "0" and m_dPaymentsBalanceDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() then check = "Należy podać datę salda płatności" exit function end if if m_bPayments <> "0" and (m_dPaymentsBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() or m_dPaymentsEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()) then check = "Należy podać daty dla płatności" exit function end if if m_bStoreBalance <> "0" and m_dStoreBalanceDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() then check = "Należy podać datę stanu magazynowego" exit function end if if m_bStoreOp <> "0" and (m_dStoreOpBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() or m_dStoreOpEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()) then check = "Należy podać daty dla operacji magazynowych" exit function end if if m_bSale <> "0" and (m_dSaleBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() or m_dSaleEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()) then check = "Należy podać daty dla dokumentów sprzedaży" exit function end if
if m_bPar <> "0" and (m_dParBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() or m_dParEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()) then check = "Należy podać daty dla paragonów" exit function end if
if m_bPurchase <> "0" and (m_bPurchaseBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() or m_bPurchaseEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()) then check = "Należy podać daty dla dokumentów zakupów towarów" exit function end if
if m_bCostPurch <> "0" and (m_dCostPurchBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() or m_dCostPurchEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()) then check = "Należy podać daty dla dokumentów zakupów kosztowych" exit function end if
if m_bAccountBalance <> "0" and m_dAccountBalanceDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() then check = "Należy podać datę dla BO" exit function end if if m_bAccountOp <> "0" and (m_dAccountOpBeginDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() or m_dAccountOpEndDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate()) then #ifdef APPCONFIG_PKPIR check = "Należy podać daty dla zapisów" #else check = "Należy podać daty dla dekretacji" #endif exit function end if if m_bTransactionBalance <> "0" and m_dTransactionBalanceDate = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() then check = "Należy podać datę dla salda rozrachunków" exit function end if end function public function description() dim strText : strText = "" if m_bCustomers <> "0" then strText = strText + "Kontrahenci." end if if m_bProducts <> "0" then strText = strText + "Produkty." end if
if m_bEmployee <> "0" then strText = strText + "Pracownicy." end if
if m_bReceipt <> "0" then strText = strText + "Recepty." end if
if m_bSrtrw <> "0" then strText = strText + "Środki trwałe." end if
if m_bPaymentsBalance <> "0" then strText = strText + "Stan kasy i banku na " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dPaymentsBalanceDate) + "." end if if m_bPayments <> "0" then strText = strText + "Płatności za okres " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dPaymentsBeginDate) + " do " +_ trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dPaymentsEndDate) + "." end if if m_bStoreBalance <> "0" then strText = strText + "Stan magazynu na dzień " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dStoreBalanceDate) + "." end if if m_bStoreOp <> "0" then strText = strText + "Operacje magazynowe za okres " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dStoreOpBeginDate) + " do " +_ trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dStoreOpEndDate) + "." end if
if m_bSale <> "0" then strText = strText + "Sprzedaż za okres " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dSaleBeginDate) + " do " +_ trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dSaleEndDate) + "." end if
if m_bPar <> "0" then strText = strText + "Paragony za okres " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dParBeginDate) + " do " +_ trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dParEndDate) + "." end if
if m_bPurchase <> "0" then strText = strText + "Zakupy towarów za okres " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_bPurchaseBeginDate) + " do " +_ trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_bPurchaseEndDate) + "." end if
if m_bCostPurch <> "0" then strText = strText + "Zakupy kosztowe za okres " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dCostPurchBeginDate) + " do " +_ trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dCostPurchEndDate) + "." end if
if m_bAccountBalance <> "0" then strText = strText + "Salda kont na dzień " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dAccountBalanceDate) + "." end if
if m_bAccountOp <> "0" then #ifdef APPCONFIG_PKPIR strText = strText + "Zapisy za okres " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dAccountOpBeginDate) + " do " +_ trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dAccountOpEndDate) + "." #else strText = strText + "Dekretacje za okres " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dAccountOpBeginDate) + " do " +_ trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dAccountOpEndDate) + "." #endif end if
if m_bAccounts <> "0" then strText = strText + "Konta o symbolu " + m_strAccounts + "." end if
if m_bTransactionBalance <> "0" then strText = strText + "Salda rozrachunków na dzień " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_dTransactionBalanceDate) end if
description =strText end function end class
function new_NFIO() set new_NFIO = new CNAVOFirmaImportOptions end function
#macro ADOLONG(_fld_name_) clng(pADORS("_fld_name_").value) #macro ADOSTR(_fld_name_) trim(cstr(pADORS("_fld_name_").value)) #macro ADODATE(_fld_name_) cdate(pADORS("_fld_name_").value) #macro ADOCUR(_fld_name_) ccur(pADORS("_fld_name_").value)
#macro CHECK_ALREADY_WAS(_srctype_,_key_,_function_) \ dim nDummy \ if pHandler.getmapping(_srctype_,_key_,nDummy,_function_) then \ exit function \ end if
#macro PUSH_VARCTXT(_var_,_value_) \ dim store##_var_ : store##_var_ = trans_.var(_var_) \ trans_.var(_var_) = _value_
#macro POP_VARCTXT(_var_) trans_.var(_var_) = store##_var_
#comment '----------------------------------------------------------- #comment '----------------------------------------------------------- function Kraj_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Kraj_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idKraj : idKraj = ADOLONG(IdKraj)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Kraj",idKraj,Kraj_Convert2NXD)
'---------- waluta ------------------- dim pNOCUJedn : set pNOCUJedn = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA,idKraj,"Jednostka",idKraj) with pNOCUJedn .map_field "strNazwa","NWaluty" .map_field "strSkrot","SNWaluty" .field("nDokladnosc") = clng(3) .field("eTyp") = clng(N5JEDNOSTKA_WALUTA) if .field("strSkrot") = "PZL" then .field("strSkrot") = "PLN" end if .mark_save_now .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .done end with
dim pNOCUKraj : set pNOCUKraj = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5KRAJ,idKraj,"Kraj",pNOCUJedn.idobj) with pNOCUKraj .map_field "strNazwa","Nazwa" .map_field "strSkrot","Skrot" .field("pWaluta") = clng(pNOCUJedn.idobj) .mark_save_now .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) end with
Kraj_Convert2NXD = pNOCUKraj.idobj end function
function Jednostka_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Jednostka_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idJedn : idJedn = ADOLONG(IdJedn)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Jednostka",idJedn,Jednostka_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCUJedn : set pNOCUJedn = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5JEDNOSTKA,idJedn,"Jednostka",idJedn)
with pNOCUJedn .map_field "strSkrot","Nazwa" .map_field "strNazwa","Nazwa" .field("nDokladnosc") = ADOLONG(Zaokr) + 1 .field("eTyp") = clng(N5JEDNOSTKA_MIARY) .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
Jednostka_Convert2NXD = pNOCUJedn.idobj end function
function GrupaArt_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : GrupaArt_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idGrArt : idGrArt = ADOLONG(IdGrArt)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("GrupaArt",idGrArt,GrupaArt_Convert2NXD)
dim idParent : idParent= ADOLONG(IdParent)
dim pNOCUGA : set pNOCUGA = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW,idGrArt,"GrupaArt",idGrArt)
with pNOCUGA .map_field "strNazwa","Nazwa" .map_ref "pGrupaNadrzedna","GrupaArt",idParent,(idParent <> 0) .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
GrupaArt_Convert2NXD = pNOCUGA.idobj end function
function GrupaKontra_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : GrupaKontra_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idGrKontra : idGrKontra = ADOLONG(IdGrKontra)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("GrupaKontra",idGrKontra,GrupaKontra_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,idGrKontra,"GrupaKontra",IdGrKontra)
with pNOCU .map_field "strNazwa","Nazwa" .map_field "curLimitKred","Limit" .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
GrupaKontra_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj end function
function SyntheticGrupaKontra(byref pHandler) : SyntheticGrupaKontra = 0
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("GrupaKontra",1,SyntheticGrupaKontra)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,1,"GrupaKontra",1)
with pNOCU .field("strNazwa") = "Importowani" .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
SyntheticGrupaKontra = clng(1) end function
function NAVOUser_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : NAVOUser_Convert2NXD = 0 CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("NAVOUser",ADOSTR(Name),NAVOUser_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5UZYTKOWNIK,0,"NAVOUser",ADOSTR(Name))
with pNOCU .map_field "strNazwa","Name" .map_field "strLogin","Name" .map_field "strHaslo","Password" .map_field "strMail","Contact" .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
NAVOUser_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj end function
function SyntheticCurrentUser(byref pHandler) CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("NAVOUser",getCurrentUser().strLogin,SyntheticCurrentUser)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5UZYTKOWNIK,0,"NAVOUser",getCurrentUser().strLogin)
with pNOCU .field("strNazwa") = getCurrentUser().strNazwa .field("strLogin") = getCurrentUser().strLogin .field("strMail") = getCurrentUser().strMail .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
SyntheticCurrentUser = pNOCU.idobj end function
function Magazyn_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Magazyn_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idMagazyn : idMagazyn = ADOLONG(IdMagazyn)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Magazyn",idMagazyn,Magazyn_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,idMagazyn,"Magazyn",idMagazyn)
with pNOCU .map_field "strNazwa","Nazwa" .map_ref "pWaluta","Kraj",ADOLONG(IdKrajWaluta),true .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
Magazyn_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj end function
#macro MAP_CENA_PRODUKTU(_nr_) \ if trim(ADOSTR(Brutto##_nr_)) = "N" then \ .map_field "curCenaNetto##_nr_","Cena##_nr_" \ else \ .map_field "curCenaBrutto##_nr_","Cena##_nr_" \ end if
'------------- mapowanie stawki VAT -------------- function convert_eVAT(byval varNAVOFirmaValue) convert_eVAT = -1 select case ccur(varNAVOFirmaValue) case ccur(0.000): '0% convert_eVAT = STAWKA_VAT_0
case ccur(0.001): 'Zwolniony convert_eVAT = STAWKA_VAT_ZWOLNIONY
case ccur(0.003): 'Nie podlega convert_eVAT = STAWKA_VAT_NIE_PODLEGA
case ccur(2.000): convert_eVAT = STAWKA_VAT_2
case ccur(3.000): convert_eVAT = STAWKA_VAT_3
case ccur(4.000): convert_eVAT = STAWKA_VAT_4
case ccur(7.000): convert_eVAT = STAWKA_VAT_7
case ccur(12.000): convert_eVAT = STAWKA_VAT_12
case ccur(17.000): convert_eVAT = STAWKA_VAT_17
case ccur(22.000): convert_eVAT = STAWKA_VAT_22
case ccur(5.000): convert_eVAT = STAWKA_VAT_5 end select end function
function Artykul_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Artykul_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idArt : idArt = ADOLONG(IdArt)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Artykul",idArt,Artykul_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCUArt : set pNOCUArt = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,idArt,"Artykul",idArt)
dim idJedn with pNOCUArt .map_field "strNazwa","Nazwa" .map_field "strIndeks","NaszInx" .map_field "strNazwaMiedzynarodowa","NazwaM" ' .map_field "strKodCelny","KodCelny" .map_field "strKodPKWiU","SWW" .field("eVAT") = clng(convert_eVAT(ADOCUR(VAT))) .map_field "strOpis","Opis" .map_ref "pGrupaProd","GrupaArt",ADOLONG(IdGrArt),true .map_ref "pJednostkaEwid","Jednostka",ADOLONG(IdJedn),true idJedn = .field("pJednostkaEwid") .field("eAktywny") = clng(N5PRODUKT_AKTYWNY) if trim(ADOSTR(TowarUsl)) <> "T" then .field("eRodzaj") = clng(N5PRODUKT_USLUGA) end if
if trim(ADOSTR(Wyrob)) = "T" then .field("prod_cWyrob") = "1" end if if trim(ADOSTR(Surowiec)) = "T" then .field("prod_cSurowiec") = "1" end if
.field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .mark_begin_unit .done end with
'--------- opakowanie [idobj taki sam jak idArt]--------------- dim pNOCUOpak : set pNOCUOpak = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5OPAKOWANIE_PRODUKTU,idArt,"ArtykulOpakowanie",pNOCUArt.idobj) with pNOCUOpak .field("strNazwa") = "Podstawowe" .map_field "strEAN","StandInx" .field("pJednOpak") = idJedn .mark_as_child TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,pNOCUArt.idobj,"listOpakowania",1 .mark_as_last_child .mark_end_unit .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0)
MAP_CENA_PRODUKTU(1) MAP_CENA_PRODUKTU(2) MAP_CENA_PRODUKTU(3) MAP_CENA_PRODUKTU(4) MAP_CENA_PRODUKTU(5) MAP_CENA_PRODUKTU(6)
end with
Artykul_Convert2NXD = pNOCUArt.idobj end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------- function RokKsieg_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : RokKsieg_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idRokKsieg: idRokKsieg = ADOLONG(Rok)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("RokKsieg",idRokKsieg,RokKsieg_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCUGA : set pNOCUGA = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5ROKKSIEG,0,"RokKsieg",idRokKsieg)
with pNOCUGA .map_field "dDataRozp","DataRozp" .map_field "dDataZakon","DataZakon" .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
RokKsieg_Convert2NXD = pNOCUGA.idobj end function '---------------------------------------------------------------- ' dokumenty magazynowe z tabeli Sprzedaz '---------------------------------------------------------------- function DokMagSP_Header(byref pHandler,byref pADORS,byref nPart,byval eTypRej) dim idTrans : idTrans = ADOLONG(id_trans) dim idTransOrg : idTransOrg = ADOLONG(IdTransOrgi) dim idMag : idMag = ADOLONG(IdMag)
set DokMagSP_Header = nothing
dim pNOCUDokMag : set pNOCUDokMag = pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,0,"DokMagSP",idTrans) with pNOCUDokMag '----- wariantowo dla WZ i ZZ (jako PZ) ----- dim strNazwaRej : strNazwaRej = eTypRejestru2Str(eTypRej)
if eTypRej = N5REJESTRDOK__PZ then .map_ref "pMagDocel","Magazyn",idMag,true else .map_ref "pMagZrod","Magazyn",idMag,true end if
'--force dependency for RokKsieg -- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(ADODATE(DataWyst))
.map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,eTypRej,strNazwaRej,year(ADODATE(DataWyst)))),true
'----- jeśli nie było nr WZ to użyjemy nr f-ry dim strNrDok : strNrDok = ADOSTR(NrDokWZ) if strNrDok = "" then strNrDok = ADOSTR(NrDok) end if
'------ dla kolejnych różnych magazynów dodajemy ## if nPart <> 0 then .field("strNrDok") = strNrDok + "##" + cstr(nPart) else .field("strNrDok") = strNrDok end if
if ADOSTR(OznTran) <> "" then .field("pKwalifikatorEx") = clng(SyntheticKwalifikator(pHandler,ADOSTR(OznTran))) end if .map_ref "pUzytRej","NAVOUser",ADOLONG(IdUser),true .map_ref "pKlient","Kontrahent",ADOLONG(IdKontra),true
.map_ref "wrefDokHandl","Sprzedaz",idTrans,true .field("wrefDokHandl_wrt") = clng(TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ)
.map_field "strUwagi","Opis" .map_field "dDataWyst","DataWyst" .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .done end with
nPart = nPart + 1
set DokMagSP_Header = pNOCUDokMag end function
function DokMagSP_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : DokMagSP_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idTrans : idTrans = ADOLONG(id_trans) CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("DokMagSP",idTrans,DokMagSP_Convert2NXD)
dim idTransOrg : idTransOrg = ADOLONG(IdTransOrgi) dim idLastMag : idLastMag = 0 dim eLastTyp : eLastTyp = 0
dim idobjNOCU : idobjNOCU = 0
dim pNOCUDokMag : set pNOCUDokMag = nothing dim pNOCUPozDokMag : set pNOCUPozDokMag = nothing
dim nPart : nPart = 0 dim nLP
do while not pADORS.EOF '-- bieżące parametry określające 'pożądany dokument' dim idMag : idMag = ADOLONG(IdMag) dim eTypRej
if idTransOrg = 0 then eTypRej = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) else eTypRej = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__PZ) end if
dim curIlosc : curIlosc = ADOCUR(ilosc) '------------------- odszukaj oryginał ----------- if idTransOrg <> 0 then dim pOrgPosADORS : set pOrgPosADORS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(_ "select ilosc from pozsprzedaz where idtrans=" + cstr(idTransOrg) + " and lp=" + cstr(ADOLONG(LP))) dim curOrgIlosc : curOrgIlosc = ccur(0.0) if not pOrgPosADORS.EOF then curOrgIlosc = ccur(pOrgPosADORS("ilosc")) end if curIlosc = curOrgIlosc - curIlosc end if
'--- korekta zwiekszajaca sprzedaz -> WZ if curIlosc < 0.0 then eTypRej = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) curIlosc = - curIlosc end if
if curIlosc > 0.0 then if idMag <> idLastMag or eTypRej <> eLastTyp then idLastMag = idMag eLastTyp = eTypRej
'-- zakoncz stary jesli byl if not pNOCUPozDokMag is nothing then pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_as_last_child pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_save_now pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_end_unit pNOCUPozDokMag.done set pNOCUPozDokMag = nothing end if
'-- rozpocznij nowy set pNOCUDokMag = DokMagSP_Header(pHandler,pADORS,nPart,eTypRej) idobjNOCU = pNOCUDokMag.idobj nLP = 1 end if
set pNOCUPozDokMag = pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5POZDOKMAG,0,"PozDokMagSP",cstr(idobjNOCU) + ";" + cstr(nLP)) pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,idobjNOCU,"listPozycje",nLP with pNOCUPozDokMag .field("curIloscOpak") = curIlosc if eTypRej <> clng(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) then dim pPrzyrozADORS : set pPrzyrozADORS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(_ "select sum(ilosc*cenaz) from przyroz where idtrans=" + cstr(idTrans) + " and lp=-" + cstr(ADOLONG(LP))) dim curWartPrzyroz : curWartPrzyroz = ccur(0.0) if not pPrzyrozADORS.EOF then curWartPrzyroz = ccur(pPrzyrozADORS(0)) end if if curIlosc <> ccur(0.0) then .field("curCenaMag") = ccur(curWartPrzyroz / curIlosc) end if end if .map_ref "pProdukt","Artykul",ADOLONG(idart),true .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) end with nLP = nLP + 1 end if
pADORS.MoveNext if pHandler.is_error() then exit function end if loop
'-- zakoncz stary jesli byl if not pNOCUPozDokMag is nothing then pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_as_last_child pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_save_now pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_end_unit pNOCUPozDokMag.done set pNOCUPozDokMag = nothing end if
DokMagSP_Convert2NXD = idobjNOCU end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------- ' dokumenty magazynowe z tabeli Zakup '---------------------------------------------------------------- '---------------------------------------------------------------- function DokMagZA_Header(byref pHandler,byref pADORS,byref nPart,byval eTypRej) set DokMagZA_Header = nothing
dim idTrans : idTrans = ADOLONG(id_trans) dim pNOCUDokMag : set pNOCUDokMag = pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,0,"DokMagZA",idTrans)
with pNOCUDokMag '----- wariantowo dla PZ i KPZ (jako WZ) ----- dim strNazwaRej : strNazwaRej = eTypRejestru2Str(eTypRej)
dim idMag : idMag = ADOLONG(IdMag) if eTypRej = N5REJESTRDOK__WZ then .map_ref "pMagZrod","Magazyn",idMag,true else .map_ref "pMagDocel","Magazyn",idMag,true end if
'--force dependency for RokKsieg -- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(ADODATE(DataOtrz))
.map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,eTypRej,strNazwaRej,year(ADODATE(DataOtrz)))),true
dim strNrDok : strNrDok = ADOSTR(NrDok)
'------ dla kolejnych różnych magazynów dodajemy ## if nPart <> 0 then .field("strNrDok") = strNrDok + "##" + cstr(nPart) else .field("strNrDok") = strNrDok end if
if ADOSTR(OznTran) <> "" then .field("pKwalifikatorEx") = clng(SyntheticKwalifikator(pHandler,ADOSTR(OznTran))) end if .map_ref "pUzytRej","NAVOUser",ADOLONG(IdUser),true .map_ref "pKlient","Kontrahent",ADOLONG(IdKontra),true .map_field "strUwagi","Opis" .map_field "dDataWyst","DataOtrz" .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .done
end with
nPart = nPart + 1
set DokMagZA_Header = pNOCUDokMag end function
function DokMagZA_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : DokMagZA_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idTrans : idTrans = ADOLONG(id_trans)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("DokMagZA",idTrans,DokMagZA_Convert2NXD)
dim idTransOrg : idTransOrg = ADOLONG(IdTransOrgi) dim idLastMag : idLastMag = 0 dim eLastTyp : eLastTyp = 0
dim idobjNOCU : idobjNOCU = 0 dim pNOCUDokMag : set pNOCUDokMag = nothing dim pNOCUPozDokMag : set pNOCUPozDokMag = nothing dim nPart : nPart = 0 dim nLP
do while not pADORS.EOF '-- bieżące parametry określające 'pożądany dokument' dim idMag : idMag = ADOLONG(IdMag) dim eTypRej if idTransOrg = 0 then eTypRej = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__PZ) else eTypRej = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) end if
dim curIlosc : curIlosc = ADOCUR(ilosc)
if idTransOrg <> 0 then '------------------- odszukaj oryginał ----------- dim pOrgPosADORS : set pOrgPosADORS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(_ "select ilosc from pozzakup where idtrans=" + cstr(idTransOrg) + " and lp=" + cstr(ADOLONG(LP))) dim curOrgIlosc : curOrgIlosc = ccur(0.0) if not pOrgPosADORS.EOF then curOrgIlosc = ccur(pOrgPosADORS("ilosc")) end if curIlosc = curOrgIlosc - curIlosc end if
'--- korekta zwiekszajaca zakup -> PZ if curIlosc < 0.0 then eTypRej = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__PZ) curIlosc = - curIlosc end if
if curIlosc > 0.0 then if idMag <> idLastMag or eTypRej <> eLastTyp then idLastMag = idMag eLastTyp = eTypRej
'-- zakoncz stary jesli byl if not pNOCUPozDokMag is nothing then pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_as_last_child pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_save_now pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_end_unit pNOCUPozDokMag.done set pNOCUPozDokMag = nothing end if
'-- rozpocznij nowy set pNOCUDokMag = DokMagZA_Header(pHandler,pADORS,nPart,eTypRej) idobjNOCU = pNOCUDokMag.idobj nLP = 1 end if
set pNOCUPozDokMag = pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5POZDOKMAG,0,"PozDokMagZA",cstr(idobjNOCU) + ";" + cstr(nLP)) pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,idobjNOCU,"listPozycje",nLP with pNOCUPozDokMag .map_ref "pProdukt","Artykul",ADOLONG(idart),true .field("curIloscOpak") = curIlosc
if eTypRej <> clng(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) then .map_field "curCenaMag","CenaKrajZak" end if .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) end with
nLP = nLP + 1 end if
pADORS.MoveNext if pHandler.is_error() then exit function end if loop
'-- zakoncz stary jesli byl if not pNOCUPozDokMag is nothing then pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_as_last_child pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_save_now pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_end_unit pNOCUPozDokMag.done set pNOCUPozDokMag = nothing end if
DokMagZA_Convert2NXD = idobjNOCU end function '---------------------------------------------------------------- ' dokumenty magazynowe z tabeli PrzesMM '---------------------------------------------------------------- function DokMagMM_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : DokMagMM_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idTrans : idTrans = ADOLONG(id_trans)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("DokMagMM",idTrans,DokMagMM_Convert2NXD)
'--force dependency for RokKsieg -- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(ADODATE(DataOp))
dim pNOCUDokMag : set pNOCUDokMag = pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,0,"DokMagMM",idTrans) dim nLP : nLP = 1
with pNOCUDokMag .mark_begin_unit .map_field "strNrDok","NrDok" .map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(N5REJESTRDOK__MM),eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK__MM),year(ADODATE(DataOp)))),true .map_ref "pMagDocel","Magazyn",ADOLONG(IdMagTo),true .map_ref "pMagZrod","Magazyn",ADOLONG(IdMagFrom),true .map_ref "pUzytRej","NAVOUser",ADOLONG(IdUser),true .map_field "dDataWyst","DataOp" if ADOSTR(OznTran) <> "" then .field("pKwalifikatorEx") = clng(SyntheticKwalifikator(pHandler,ADOSTR(OznTran))) end if .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .done end with
dim pNOCUPozDokMag : set pNOCUPozDokMag = nothing
do while not pADORS.EOF set pNOCUPozDokMag = pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5POZDOKMAG,0,"PozDokMagMM",cstr(pNOCUDokMag.idobj) + ";" + cstr(nLP)) pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,pNOCUDokMag.idobj,"listPozycje",nLP
with pNOCUPozDokMag .map_ref "pProdukt","Artykul",ADOLONG(idart),true .map_field "curIloscOpak","ilosc" .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) end with
pADORS.MoveNext nLP = nLP + 1 if pHandler.is_error() then exit function end if loop if not pNOCUPozDokMag is nothing then pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_as_last_child pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_save_now pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_end_unit end if
DokMagMM_Convert2NXD = pNOCUDokMag.idobj end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------- ' dokumenty magazynowe z tabeli RW_PW '---------------------------------------------------------------- function DokMagRP_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : DokMagRP_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idTrans : idTrans = ADOLONG(id_trans)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("DokMagRP",idTrans,DokMagRP_Convert2NXD)
'--force dependency for RokKsieg -- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(ADODATE(DataOp))
dim idLastMag : idLastMag = 0 dim idobjNOCU : idobjNOCU = 0 dim pNOCUDokMag dim pNOCUPozDokMag : set pNOCUPozDokMag = nothing dim nPart : nPart = 0 dim nLP do while not pADORS.EOF dim idMag : idMag = ADOLONG(IdMag) if idMag <> idLastMag then idLastMag = idMag
set pNOCUDokMag = pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,0,"DokMagRP",idTrans) idobjNOCU = pNOCUDokMag.idobj nLP = 1
with pNOCUDokMag .mark_begin_unit
'----- wariantowo dla RW i PW -----
'----- produkcja jest tłumaczona jako RW/PW
dim eTypRej dim strNazwaRej select case ADOSTR(Typ) case "R" eTypRej=clng(N5REJESTRDOK__RW) strNazwaRej = eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK__RW) .map_ref "pMagZrod","Magazyn",idMag,true case "S" 'ROZCHOD_PROD eTypRej=clng(N5REJESTRDOK__RW) strNazwaRej = eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK__RW) .map_ref "pMagZrod","Magazyn",idMag,true '.field("_pMagDocel_produkcja_") = clng(0) case "U" 'UTARG dim idKontra : idKontra = ADOLONG(IdKontra) if idKontra = 0 then eTypRej=clng(N5REJESTRDOK__RW) strNazwaRej = eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK__RW) else eTypRej=clng(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) strNazwaRej = eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) .map_ref "pKlient","Kontrahent",ADOLONG(IdKontra),true end if .map_ref "pMagZrod","Magazyn",idMag,true case "P" eTypRej=clng(N5REJESTRDOK__PW) strNazwaRej = eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK__PW) .map_ref "pMagDocel","Magazyn",idMag,true case "Q" 'PRZYCHOD_PROD eTypRej=clng(N5REJESTRDOK__PW) strNazwaRej = eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK__PW) .map_ref "pMagDocel","Magazyn",idMag,true '.field("_pMagZrod_produkcja_") = clng(0) end select
'--force dependency for RokKsieg -- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(ADODATE(DataOp))
.map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,eTypRej,strNazwaRej,year(ADODATE(DataOp)))),true
dim strNrDok : strNrDok = ADOSTR(NrDok)
'------ dla kolejnych różnych magazynów dodajemy ## if nPart <> 0 then .field("strNrDok") = strNrDok + "##" + cstr(nPart) else .field("strNrDok") = strNrDok end if
if ADOSTR(OznTran) <> "" then .field("pKwalifikatorEx") = clng(SyntheticKwalifikator(pHandler,ADOSTR(OznTran))) end if
.map_ref "pUzytRej","NAVOUser",ADOLONG(IdUser),true .map_field "strUwagi","Opis" .map_field "dDataWyst","DataOp" .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .done end with
nPart = nPart + 1
if not pNOCUPozDokMag is nothing then pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_as_last_child pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_save_now pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_end_unit end if end if
set pNOCUPozDokMag = pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5POZDOKMAG,0,"PozDokMagRP",cstr(pNOCUDokMag.idobj) + ";" + cstr(nLP)) pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,pNOCUDokMag.idobj,"listPozycje",nLP with pNOCUPozDokMag .map_ref "pProdukt","Artykul",ADOLONG(idart),true .map_field "curIloscOpak","ilosc" if eTypRej <> clng(N5REJESTRDOK__RW) and eTypRej <> clng(N5REJESTRDOK__MR) and eTypRej <> clng(N5REJESTRDOK__RP) and eTypRej <> clng(N5REJESTRDOK__WZ) then .map_field "curCenaMag","Cena" end if .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) end with
pADORS.MoveNext nLP = nLP + 1 if pHandler.is_error() then exit function end if loop if not pNOCUPozDokMag is nothing then pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_as_last_child pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_save_now pNOCUPozDokMag.mark_end_unit end if
DokMagRP_Convert2NXD = idobjNOCU end function '----------------------------------------------------------------
function Wojew_Mapper(byref pHandler,byval strWojewodztwo) : Wojew_Mapper = 0
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Wojewodztwo",strWojewodztwo,Wojew_Mapper)
dim pNOCUWojew : set pNOCUWojew = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5WOJEWODZTWO,0,"Wojewodztwo",strWojewodztwo)
pNOCUWojew.field("strNazwa") = strWojewodztwo
'------------------- odszukaj kraj PL ----------- dim pADORS : set pADORS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute("select idkraj from kraj where Skrot='PL'") if pADORS.EOF then '-------- lub dowolny ------------ set pADORS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute("select top 1 idkraj from kraj") if pADORS.EOF then exit function end if end if pNOCUWojew.map_ref "pKraj","Kraj",clng(pADORS("idkraj")),true pNOCUWojew.mark_save_now pNOCUWojew.field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) pNOCUWojew.field("_leave_sub") = clng(0)
Wojew_Mapper = pNOCUWojew.idobj end function
function SyntheticMiejscowosc(byref pHandler,byval strMiejscowosc,byval strKodPoczt) if trim(strMiejscowosc) = "" then strMiejscowosc = "nieznana" end if
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Miejscowosc",strMiejscowosc,SyntheticMiejscowosc)
dim strWojewodztwo : strWojewodztwo = doc_.afc.business.zip2area_pl(trim(strKodPoczt)) if strWojewodztwo = "" then strWojewodztwo = "nieznane" end if
dim pNOCUMiejsc : set pNOCUMiejsc = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5MIEJSCOWOSC,0,"Miejscowosc",strMiejscowosc)
with pNOCUMiejsc .field("strNazwa") = strMiejscowosc .field("pWojewodztwo") = clng(Wojew_Mapper(pHandler,strWojewodztwo)) .field("eWielkosc") = clng(7) .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
SyntheticMiejscowosc = pNOCUMiejsc.idobj end function
function Miejsc_Mapper(byref pHandler,pADORS) Miejsc_Mapper = SyntheticMiejscowosc(pHandler,ADOSTR(Miejsc),ADOSTR(Kod)) end function
function Urzad_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Urzad_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idUrzad : idUrzad = ADOLONG(IdUrzad)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Instytucja",idUrzad,Urzad_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5INSTYTUCJA,idUrzad,"Instytucja",idUrzad)
with pNOCU .map_field "strNazwa","Nazwa" .map_field "strSkrot","Symbol" .field("pTyp") = clng(SyntheticTypInstytucji(pHandler,"Urząd"))
.map_field "strUlica","Ulica" .map_field "strNrDomu","NrDomu" .map_field "strNrLokalu","NrLokalu" .map_field "strKod","Kod" .field("pMiejscowosc") = clng(Miejsc_Mapper(pHandler,pADORS))
if trim(ADOSTR(KontoBank)) <> "" and trim(ADOSTR(Bank)) <> "" then .map_field "strRachunek1","KontoBank" .field("pBank1") = clng(SyntheticBank(pHandler,ADOSTR(KontoBank),ADOSTR(Bank))) end if
if pHandler.get_level() > 1 then .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) end if .mark_save_now .done end with
Urzad_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj end function
function SyntheticUrzadCelny(byref pHandler) : SyntheticUrzadCelny = 0
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Instytucja","UC/NF",SyntheticUrzadCelny)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5INSTYTUCJA,0,"Instytucja","UC/NF")
with pNOCU .field("strNazwa") = "Urząd Celny (NAVO Firma)" .field("strSkrot") = .field("strNazwa") .field("pTyp") = clng(SyntheticTypInstytucji(pHandler,"Urząd Celny"))
.field("pMiejscowosc") = clng(SyntheticMiejscowosc(pHandler,"","")) if pHandler.get_level() > 1 then .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) end if .mark_save_now .done end with
SyntheticUrzadCelny = pNOCU.idobj end function
function Kontrahent_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Kontrahent_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idKontra : idKontra = ADOLONG(id_kontra)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Kontrahent",idKontra,Kontrahent_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5KLIENT,idKontra,"Kontrahent",idKontra)
with pNOCU .map_field "strIndeks","Indeks" .map_field "strNazwa","Nazwa" .map_field "strSkrot","Indeks" .map_field "strUlica","Ulica" .map_field "strKod","Kod" .map_field "strTel1","Tel1" .map_field "strTel2","Tel2" .map_field "strTel3","Tel3" .map_field "strFax","Fax" .map_field "strEmail","email" .map_ref "pGrupaKlient","GrupaKontra",ADOLONG(id_gr_kontra),true 'KontraSprz if .field("pGrupaKlient") = 0 then .map_ref "pGrupaKlient","GrupaKontra",clng(SyntheticGrupaKontra(pHandler)),true end if
.map_field "strNIP","NIP" .map_field "strUwagi","txt_opis" 'KontraSprz .map_field "curLimitKred","cur_lk" 'KontraSprz
.map_field "strNrDokTozsamosci","txt_dtnumer" 'KontraSprz .map_field "kli_dDTDataWyst","txt_dtdatawyst" 'KontraSprz .map_field "kli_strDTOrganWyst","txt_dtorgan" 'KontraSprz ' '-- nie da się okreslic na podstawie tego - program nie ma '-- jak rozbić nazwy na imie i nazwisko ' if .field("strNIP") = "" then ' .field("ePrywat") = clng(N5KLIENT_OSOBAPRYWATNA) ' else ' end if .field("ePrywat") = clng(N5KLIENT_FIRMA)
.field("pMiejscowosc") = clng(Miejsc_Mapper(pHandler,pADORS)) .mark_save_now
if pHandler.get_level() > 1 then .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) end if
.done end with
Kontrahent_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj end function
function Pracownik_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Pracownik_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idPrac : idPrac = ADOLONG(IdPrac)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Pracownik",idPrac,Pracownik_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK,idPrac,"Pracownik",idPrac)
with pNOCU
.map_field "strNazwisko","Nazwisko" .map_field "strImie","Imie1" .map_field "prac_strIndeks","Symbol" .map_field "strPESEL","PESEL" .map_field "strNIP","NIP" .map_field "strImie2","Imie2" .map_field "dDataUr","DataUr" .map_field "strMiejsceUr","MiejscUr" .map_field "strUlica","Ulica" .map_field "strNrDomu","NrDomu" .map_field "strNrLokalu","NrLokalu" .map_field "strKod","Kod" .map_field "strTel1","Tel1" .map_field "strTel2","Tel2" .map_field "strFax","Fax"
if trim(ADOSTR(KontoBank)) <> "" and trim(ADOSTR(Bank)) <> "" then .map_field "strRachunek1","KontoBank" .field("pBank1") = clng(SyntheticBank(pHandler,ADOSTR(KontoBank),ADOSTR(Bank))) end if
.field("pMiejscowosc") = clng(Miejsc_Mapper(pHandler,pADORS)) if pHandler.get_level() > 1 then .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) end if .mark_save_now .done end with
Pracownik_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj end function
#define VARCTXT_KONTO_EANALIT 101
function Konto_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Konto_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idKonto : idKonto = ADOLONG(IdKonto)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Konto",idKonto,Konto_Convert2NXD)
dim idParent : idParent = ADOLONG(IdParent)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5KONTO,idKonto,"Konto",idKonto)
with pNOCU .map_field "strSymbol","Symbol" .map_field "strNazwa","Nazwa" .map_field "strOpis","Komentarz" PUSH_VARCTXT(VARCTXT_KONTO_EANALIT,clng(N5KONTO_SYNTETYCZNE)) .map_ref "pKontoNadrz","Konto",ADOLONG(idParent),(idParent <> 0) POP_VARCTXT(VARCTXT_KONTO_EANALIT)
.field("eAnalit") = trans_.var(VARCTXT_KONTO_EANALIT) if trim(ADOSTR(Bilans)) = "B" then .field("eBilans") = clng(N5KONTO_BILANSOWE) else .field("eBilans") = clng(N5KONTO_POZABILANSOWE) end if .field("eAktywne") = clng(N5KONTO_AKTYWNE) dim idKontra : idKontra = ADOLONG(IdKontra) if idKontra <> 0 then .map_ref "wrefPodmiotRozrach","Kontrahent",idKontra,true .field("wrefPodmiotRozrach_wrt") = clng(TYPEID_N5KLIENT) else dim idPrac : idPrac = ADOLONG(idPrac) if idPrac <> 0 then .map_ref "wrefPodmiotRozrach","Pracownik",idPrac,true .field("wrefPodmiotRozrach_wrt") = clng(TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK) else .null_ref "wrefPodmiotRozrach" end if end if if pHandler.get_level() > 1 then .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) end if .mark_save_now end with
Konto_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj end function
function RejPol_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : RejPol_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idRejPol : idRejPol = ADOLONG(IdRejPol)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("RejPol",idRejPol,RejPol_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,idRejPol,"RejPol",idRejPol)
with pNOCU .map_field "strNazwa","Nazwa" .field("strFormatNumeracji") = ADOSTR(Kod) + "%r/%n" .field("eTyp") = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_DZIENNIK_NORM) .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .map_ref "pRokKsieg","RokKsieg",ADOLONG(Rok),true .mark_save_now .done end with
RejPol_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj end function
function RejTyp_Mapper(strTypRej) dim nTyp : nTyp = 0
select case UCase(Trim(strTypRej)) case "BANK","BNP","BNR" nTyp = N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY
case "KASA","KP","KW" nTyp = N5REJESTRDOK_KASOWY
case "SRTW" nTyp = N5REJESTRDOK_SRODKI_TRWALE
case "PL99" nTyp = N5REJESTRDOK_WYNAGR
case else end select RejTyp_Mapper = nTyp end function
function Rejestr_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Rejestr_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idRej : idRej = ADOLONG(IdRej)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Rejestr",idRej,Rejestr_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,idRej,"Rejestr",idRej)
with pNOCU .field("strNazwa") = ADOSTR(Nazwa) + "/" + cstr(ADOLONG(Rok)) .field("strFormatNumeracji") = ADOSTR(Kod) + "/" + cstr(ADOLONG(Rok)) + "/%n" .field("strFormatNumeracji2") = ADOSTR(Kod) + "2/" + cstr(ADOLONG(Rok)) + "/%n" .field("eTyp") = clng(RejTyp_Mapper(ADOSTR(TypRej))) .map_ref "pRokKsieg","RokKsieg",ADOLONG(Rok),true .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now .done end with
Rejestr_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj
end function
sub Dekret_Mapper(byref pNOCU,byref pADORS) with pNOCU .map_field "curWn","KwotaWn" .map_field "curMa","KwotaMa" .map_field "strOpis","Opis" .map_ref "pKonto","Konto",ADOLONG(IdKonto),true end with end sub
function Polecenie_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,pADORS) : Polecenie_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idPolec : idPolec = ADOLONG(IdPolec)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Polecenie",idPolec,Polecenie_Convert2NXD)
'--force dependency for RokKsieg -- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(ADODATE(DataWyst))
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG,idPolec,"Polecenie",idPolec) with pNOCU .map_field "dDataRej","DataWyst" .map_field "dDataKsieg","DataKsieg"
'__IG__ - łamanie przez id dim strNrDowKsieg strNrDowKsieg = left(ADOSTR(NrDok),32-1-len(cstr(ADOLONG(idPolec)))) +_ "/" + cstr(ADOLONG(idPolec)) .field("strNrDok") = strNrDowKsieg .field("eTyp") = clng(N5_DEKRET_TYP_NORMALNY) .map_ref "pUzytRej","NAVOUser",ADOLONG(IdUser),true .map_ref "pRejestrDok","RejPol",ADOLONG(IdRejPol),true .mark_begin_unit .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .done end with
#comment '---------- dekrety ------------------- dim pDekretRS : set pDekretRS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(_ "select * from dekret where (KwotaWn <> 0.0 or kwotama <> 0.0) and IdPolec=" + cstr(idPolec) + " order by DocLP")
dim iter : iter = 1 do while not pDekretRS.EOF dim pNOCUDekret : set pNOCUDekret = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pDekretRS,TYPEID_N5DEKRET,0,"Dekret",cstr(pNOCU.idobj) + ";" + cstr(iter))
Dekret_Mapper pNOCUDekret,pDekretRS
pDekretRS.MoveNext
pNOCUDekret.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG,pNOCU.idobj,"listDekret",iter pNOCUDekret.field("_with_recalc") = clng(0)
if pDekretRS.EOF then pNOCUDekret.mark_as_last_child pNOCUDekret.mark_save_now pNOCUDekret.mark_end_unit end if pNOCUDekret.done iter = iter + 1 if pHandler.is_error() then exit function end if loop
Polecenie_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj end function
'--- z braku rejestrów syntetyzujemy własne function SyntheticRejestr(byref pHandler,byval eTypRej,byval strNazwa,byval nRok)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Rejestr",clng(eTypRej),SyntheticRejestr)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,clng(eTypRej),"Rejestr",clng(eTypRej)) with pNOCU .field("strNazwa") = strNazwa .field("eTyp") = clng(eTypRej) .null_ref "pRokKsieg" .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
SyntheticRejestr = pNOCU.idobj end function
function SyntheticTypInstytucji(byref pHandler,byval strNazwa)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("TypInstytucji","Urząd",SyntheticTypInstytucji)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5TYPINSTYTUCJI,0,"TypInstytucji","Urząd") with pNOCU .field("strNazwa") = strNazwa .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
SyntheticTypInstytucji = pNOCU.idobj end function
function SyntheticTransakcja(byref pHandler,byval strSymbTrans,byval idPodmiot,byval typeidPodmiot,byval eTyp)
dim strKey : strKey = strSymbTrans + ";" + cstr(idPodmiot) + ";" + cstr(typeidPodmiot)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Transakcja",strKey,SyntheticTransakcja)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA,0,"Transakcja",strKey) with pNOCU .field("strSymTrans") = strSymbTrans .field("wrefPodmiot") = clng(idPodmiot) .field("wrefPodmiot_wrt") = clng(typeidPodmiot) if typeidPodmiot = TYPEID_N5FIRMA then .field("_wrefPodmiot_current_firma_") = clng(0) end if .field("eTyp") = clng(eTyp) .field("curWn") = ccur(0) .field("curMa") = ccur(0) .field("curWnEwid") = ccur(0) .field("curMaEwid") = ccur(0) .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
SyntheticTransakcja = pNOCU.idobj end function
function SyntheticRozlVAT(byref pHandler,byval dDataOd,byref idMappedUser) dDataOd = dateserial(year(dDataOd),month(dDataOd),1)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("RozlVat",cstr(dDataOd),SyntheticRozlVAT)
dim dDataDo : dDataDo = dateserial(year(dDataOd),month(dDataOd)+1,0) dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5ROZLVAT,0,"RozlVat",cstr(dDataOd)) with pNOCU .field("vat7_dDataOd") = dDataOd .field("vat7_dDataDo") = dDataDo .field("vat7_pUzytRej") = idMappedUser .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
SyntheticRozlVAT = pNOCU.idobj end function
function SyntheticBank(byref pHandler,byval strRachunek,byval strNazwa) '-------------------------------------- 'wydobądź kod banku z numeru rachunku '-------------------------------------- if mid(strRachunek,9,1) = "-" then strRachunek = left(strRachunek,8) 'stary format else strRachunek = replace(replace(strRachunek," ",""),"-","")
if len(strRachunek) = 24 then strRachunek = left(strRachunek, 8) else if len(strRachunek) = 26 then strRachunek = mid(strRachunek, 3,8) end if end if end if
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Bank",strRachunek,SyntheticBank)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5BANK,0,"Bank",strRachunek) with pNOCU .field("strNazwa") = strNazwa .field("strSkrot") = strNazwa .field("strOddzial") = "uzupełnić" .field("strKodRach") = strRachunek .field("pMiejscowosc") = clng(SyntheticMiejscowosc(pHandler,"","")) .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
SyntheticBank = pNOCU.idobj end function
function SyntheticKwalifikator(byref pHandler,byval strNazwa)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Kwalifikator",strNazwa,SyntheticKwalifikator)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5KWALIFIKATOR,0,"Kwalifikator",strNazwa) with pNOCU .field("strNazwa") = strNazwa .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
SyntheticKwalifikator = pNOCU.idobj end function
function PozSprzedaz_Mapper(byref pNOCU,byref pADORS,byval bFakturaOdBrutto) with pNOCU .map_field "curIloscOpak","ilosc" if bFakturaOdBrutto then .map_field "curCenaBrutto","CenaKraj" else .map_field "curCenaNettoWal","CenaKraj" end if .map_field "curRabat","Rabat" .map_ref "pProdukt","Artykul",ADOLONG(IdArt),true .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) end with end function
function PozParagon_Mapper(byref pNOCU,byref pADORS) with pNOCU .map_field "curIloscOpak","ilosc" .map_field "curCenaBrutto","Cena" .map_ref "pProdukt","Artykul",ADOLONG(IdArt),true .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) end with end function
function SposPlat_Mapper(byref pHandler,byval strNazwa,byval nDni) : SposPlat_Mapper = 0
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("SposPlat",strNazwa,SposPlat_Mapper)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5SPOSPLAT,0,"SposPlat",strNazwa) with pNOCU .field("strNazwa") = strNazwa .field("nDni") = clng(nDni) if nDni <> 0 then .field("eTyp") = clng(N5SPOSPLAT_PRZELEW) else .field("eTyp") = clng(N5SPOSPLAT_GOTOWKA) end if if trim(.field("strNazwa")) = "" then .field("strNazwa") = "nieokreślony" end if .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
SposPlat_Mapper = pNOCU.idobj end function
function Sprzedaz_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Sprzedaz_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idSprzed : idSprzed = ADOLONG(IdTrans)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Sprzedaz",idSprzed,Sprzedaz_Convert2NXD)
dim bFakturaOdBrutto : bFakturaOdBrutto = false '--force dependency for RokKsieg -- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(ADODATE(DataWyst))
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,idSprzed,"Sprzedaz",idSprzed)
with pNOCU .map_field "strNrDok","NrDok" if .field("strNrDok") = "" then 'gdy sama WZ użyj tego numeru .map_field "strNrDok","NrDokWZ" end if .map_ref "pKlient","Kontrahent",ADOLONG(IdKontra),true
.map_field "dDataWyst","DataWyst" .map_field "dDataSprzed","DataSprz" .map_field "dDataPlat","DataPlat" .map_ref "pUzytRej","NAVOUser",ADOLONG(IdUser),true .map_field "strUwagi","Opis"
if ADOSTR(Brutto) = "T" then .field("eNettoBrutto") = clng(N5SPRZEDAZ_BRUTTO) bFakturaOdBrutto = true else 'to jest wartość domyślna wiec nie wypisujemy '.field("eNettoBrutto") = N5SPRZEDAZ_NETTO end if if ADOSTR(Drukowano) = "0" then 'to jest wartość domyślna więc nie wypisujemy '.field("eSposVAT") = N5SPRZEDAZ_VAT_POZYCJE else .field("eSposVAT") = clng(N5SPRZEDAZ_VAT_STAWKI) end if
.field("pTransakcja") = clng(SyntheticTransakcja(pHandler, _ .field("strNrDok"),.field("pKlient"),TYPEID_N5KLIENT , 2 ))
dim idTransOrg : idTransOrg = ADOLONG(IdTransOrgi)
if idTransOrg <> 0 then if ADOLONG(IdKraj) = ADOLONG(IdZagr) then .map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_SP), _ eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_SP),year(ADODATE(DataWyst)))),true .map_ref "pPopSprzed","Sprzedaz",idTransOrg,true else .map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WDT), _ eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WDT),year(ADODATE(DataWyst)))),true .map_ref "pPopSprzed","Sprzedaz",idTransOrg,true end if else if ADOLONG(IdKraj) = ADOLONG(IdZagr) then .map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_SP), _ eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_SP),year(ADODATE(DataWyst)))),true .null_ref "pPopSprzed" else .map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(N5REJESTRDOK_WDT), _ eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK_WDT),year(ADODATE(DataWyst)))),true .null_ref "pPopSprzed" end if end if
if ADOSTR(OznTran) <> "" then .field("pKwalifikatorEx") = clng(SyntheticKwalifikator(pHandler,ADOSTR(OznTran))) end if
.field("pSposobPlatnosci") = clng(SposPlat_Mapper(pHandler,ADOSTR(SposobPlat),ADODATE(DataPlat) - ADODATE(DataWyst)))
dim idMappedUser: idMappedUser = pHandler.get_ref_id("NAVOUser",ADOLONG(IdUser))
.field("pRozlVat") = clng(SyntheticRozlVAT(pHandler,.field("dDataWyst"),idMappedUser)) .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .done end with
Sprzedaz_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj
#comment '---------- pozycje sprzedaży -------------------
dim pPozSprzedazRS : set pPozSprzedazRS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(_ "select * from PozSprzedaz where IdTrans=" + cstr(idSprzed) + " order by LP") dim iter : iter = 1 do while not pPozSprzedazRS.EOF dim pNOCUPoz : set pNOCUPoz = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pPozSprzedazRS,TYPEID_N5POZSPRZEDAZ,0,"PozSprzedaz",cstr(pNOCU.idobj) + ";" + cstr(iter))
PozSprzedaz_Mapper pNOCUPoz,pPozSprzedazRS,bFakturaOdBrutto
pPozSprzedazRS.MoveNext pNOCUPoz.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,pNOCU.idobj,"listPozycje",iter
if pPozSprzedazRS.EOF then pNOCUPoz.mark_as_last_child pNOCUPoz.mark_save_now end if
pNOCUPoz.done iter = iter + 1 if pHandler.is_error() then exit function end if loop
'---- issue save now -- ' dim pSaveNow : set pSaveNow = pHandler.new_special_object() ' pSaveNow("_save_now") = clng(0) ' pHandler.process_object pSaveNow end function
#comment '-------------------- zakup ------------------- function PozZakup_Mapper(byref pNOCU,byref pADORS,byval bZagranica) with pNOCU .map_field "curIloscOpak","ilosc" if bZagranica then '------------------------------- ' pozwalamy systemowi wyliczyc samodzielnie ' .field("curWartNetto") = ccur(ADOCUR(CenaKrajZak) * ADOCUR(ilosc)) ' .field("curVAT") = ccur(.field("curWartNetto") * _ ' vat2val(convert_eVAT(ADOCUR(VAT)))) ' .field("curWartBrutto") = .field("curVAT") + .field("curWartNetto") '------------------------------- .map_field "curCenaNettoWal","CenaZagr" else .map_field "curCenaNettoWal","CenaKrajNab" end if .map_ref "pProdukt","Artykul",ADOLONG(IdArt),true .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) end with end function
function GetKurs(byref pHandler,byval idKrajFrom,byval idKrajTo,byval dData,byval cSprzedaz) dim pKursRS : set pKursRS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(_ "select * from KursyWal where IdKrajFrom=" + cstr(idKrajFrom) + " and IdKrajTo=" + cstr(idKrajTo) +_ " and DataDef<=" + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dData) + " and Sprzedaz='" + cSprzedaz + "' order by DataDef desc") if pKursRS.EOF then GetKurs = ccur(1.0) else dim dblTmp : dblTmp = cdbl(pKursRS("Kurs")) if ccur(dblTmp) <> ccur(0.0) then GetKurs = ccur(1.0 / dblTmp) else GetKurs = ccur(1.0) end if end if end function
function Zakup_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Zakup_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idZakup : idZakup = ADOLONG(IdTrans)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Zakup",idZakup,Zakup_Convert2NXD)
'--force dependency for RokKsieg-- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(ADODATE(DataOtrz))
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,idZakup,"Zakup",idZakup)
with pNOCU
'UWAGA!!!! 'Zdarza się ze korekta i zaku mają takie same pole NrDokObcy - wtedy jest błąd zmiany rejestru 'Poprawka to to co pod napisem "POPRAWKA" - komentowac odpowiednia czesc
'STANDARD .map_field "strNrDok","NrDokObcy" if .field("strNrDok") = "" then .field("strNrDok") = ADOSTR(NrDok) end if .map_field "strNrDokObcy","NrDokObcy"
'POPRAWKA ' .map_field "strNrDok","NrDok" ' .map_field "strNrDokObcy","NrDokObcy"
.map_ref "pDostawca","Kontrahent",ADOLONG(IdKontra),true
.map_field "dDataWyst","DataWyst" .map_field "dDataOtrzym","DataOtrz" .map_field "dDataZakupu","DataOtrz" .map_field "dDataPlat","DataPlat" .map_ref "pUzytRej","NAVOUser",ADOLONG(IdUser),true .map_field "strUwagi","Opis"
.map_field "curSumaOplatyKraj","SumaVATObcy" .map_field "curSumaOplatyZagr","SumaVATObcyZagr"
' .map_field "curSumaNetto","SumaNetto" ' .map_field "curSumaVAT","SumaVAT" ' .field("curSumaBrutto") = .field("curSumaNetto") + .field("curSumaVAT")
dim strSymbolTrans strSymbolTrans = .field("strNrDokObcy") if strSymbolTrans = "" then strSymbolTrans = .field("strNrDok") end if
.field("pTransakcja") = clng(SyntheticTransakcja(pHandler, _ strSymbolTrans,.field("pDostawca"),TYPEID_N5KLIENT , 1))
dim idTransOrg : idTransOrg = ADOLONG(IdTransOrgi) dim nTypRejestru if idTransOrg <> 0 then if ADOSTR(VATRR) = "0" then if ADOLONG(IdKraj) <> ADOLONG(IdZagr) then if cdate(.field("dDataWyst")) < dateserial(2004,05,01) then nTypRejestru = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_IMP) else if instr(ADOSTR(OznTran),"WNT") > 0 then nTypRejestru = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WNT) else nTypRejestru = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_IMP) end if end if else nTypRejestru = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK) end if else nTypRejestru = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK_RR) end if .map_ref "pPopZakup","Zakup",idTransOrg,true else if ADOSTR(VATRR) = "0" then if ADOLONG(IdKraj) <> ADOLONG(IdZagr) then if cdate(.field("dDataWyst")) < dateserial(2004,05,01) then nTypRejestru = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_IMP) else if instr(ADOSTR(OznTran),"WNT") > 0 then nTypRejestru = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_WNT) else nTypRejestru = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_IMP) end if end if else nTypRejestru = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_ZAK) end if else nTypRejestru = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_ZAK_RR) end if .null_ref "pPopZakup" end if
if nTypRejestru = N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_IMP or nTypRejestru = N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_IMP then .field("pUrzadCelny") = clng(SyntheticUrzadCelny(pHandler)) end if
if ADOLONG(IdKraj) <> ADOLONG(IdZagr) then .map_ref "pWaluta","Kraj",ADOLONG(IdZagr),true .field("curKurs") = GetKurs(pHandler,ADOLONG(IdKraj),ADOLONG(IdZagr),cdate(.field("dDataWyst")),"N") end if
.map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(nTypRejestru), _ eTypRejestru2Str(nTypRejestru),year(ADODATE(DataOtrz)))),true
if ADOSTR(OznTran) <> "" then .field("pKwalifikatorEx") = clng(SyntheticKwalifikator(pHandler,ADOSTR(OznTran))) end if
.field("pSposobPlatnosci") = clng(SposPlat_Mapper(pHandler,ADOSTR(SposobPlat),ADODATE(DataPlat) - ADODATE(DataWyst))) dim idMappedUser: idMappedUser = pHandler.get_ref_id("NAVOUser",ADOLONG(IdUser)) .field("pRozlVat") = clng(SyntheticRozlVAT(pHandler,.field("dDataOtrzym"),idMappedUser)) .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .done end with
Zakup_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj
#comment '---------- pozycje zakupu -------------------
dim pPozZakupRS : set pPozZakupRS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(_ "select * from PozZakup where IdTrans=" + cstr(idZakup) + " order by LP") dim iter : iter = 1 do while not pPozZakupRS.EOF dim pNOCUPoz : set pNOCUPoz = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pPozZakupRS,TYPEID_N5POZZAKUP,0,"PozZakup",cstr(pNOCU.idobj) + ";" + cstr(iter))
dim bZakup_Zagranica : bZakup_Zagranica = (ADOLONG(IdKraj) <> ADOLONG(IdZagr)) PozZakup_Mapper pNOCUPoz,pPozZakupRS,bZakup_Zagranica
pPozZakupRS.MoveNext pNOCUPoz.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,pNOCU.idobj,"listPozycje",iter
if pPozZakupRS.EOF then if bZakup_Zagranica then pNOCUPoz.field("_perform_calculations") = clng(0) end if pNOCUPoz.mark_as_last_child pNOCUPoz.mark_save_now end if
pNOCUPoz.done iter = iter + 1 if pHandler.is_error() then exit function end if loop
end function
#comment '----------------------------------------------------------- function EwidZakup_Common(byref pHandler,byref pADORS,byref pNOCU) with pNOCU .map_ref "pDostawca","Kontrahent",ADOLONG(IdKontra),true
.map_field "dDataWyst","DataWyst" .map_field "dDataOtrzym","DataOtrz" .map_field "dDataZakupu","DataOtrz" .map_field "dDataPlat","DataPlat" .field("pUzytRej") = clng(SyntheticCurrentUser(pHandler)) .map_field "strUwagi","Uwagi"
dim strSymbolTrans strSymbolTrans = .field("strNrDok")
.field("pTransakcja") = clng(SyntheticTransakcja(pHandler, _ strSymbolTrans,.field("pDostawca"),TYPEID_N5KLIENT,1))
dim nTypDow : nTypDow = ADOLONG(TypDow) dim nTypRejestru
'----------------------------- 'nie umiemy znaleźć powiązania dla korekty zakupu '----------------------------- ' if nTypDow = 2 or nTypDow = 3 then ' nTypRejestru = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK) ' else nTypRejestru = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_ZAK) ' end if
if nTypRejestru = N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_IMP or nTypRejestru = N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_IMP then .field("pUrzadCelny") = clng(SyntheticUrzadCelny(pHandler)) end if
.map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(nTypRejestru), _ eTypRejestru2Str(nTypRejestru),year(ADODATE(DataOtrz)))),true
if ADOSTR(OznTran) <> "" then .field("pKwalifikatorEx") = clng(SyntheticKwalifikator(pHandler,ADOSTR(OznTran))) end if
.field("pSposobPlatnosci") = clng(SposPlat_Mapper(pHandler,"",ADODATE(DataPlat) - ADODATE(DataWyst)))
.field("pRozlVat") = clng(SyntheticRozlVAT(pHandler,.field("dDataOtrzym"),clng(SyntheticCurrentUser(pHandler)))) .null_ref "pPopZakup" .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with end function
function EwidZakup_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : EwidZakup_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idDoc : idDoc = ADOLONG(IdDoc) dim strKey: strKey = left(ADOSTR(NrDok),29)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("EwidZakup",strKey,EwidZakup_Convert2NXD)
'--force dependency for RokKsieg-- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(ADODATE(DataOtrz))
dim bOpodatkowana dim bMieszana dim bNieOpodatkowana
bOpodatkowana = ( _ ADOCUR(VAT22S) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(VAT22O) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(VAT17S) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(VAT17O) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(VAT7S) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(VAT7O) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(VATAS) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(VATAO) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(VAT3S) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(VAT3O) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(VATBS) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(VATBO) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(Netto22S) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(Netto22O) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(Netto17S) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(Netto17O) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(Netto7S) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(Netto7O) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(NettoAS) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(NettoAO) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(Netto3S) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(Netto3O) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(NettoBS) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(NettoBO) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(Netto0S) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(Netto0O) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(NettoZwS) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(NettoZwO) <> 0.0 _ )
bNieOpodatkowana = ( ADOCUR(NettoNP) <> 0.0)
bMieszana = ( _ ADOCUR(VAT22M) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(VAT17M) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(VAT12M) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(VAT7M) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(VATAM) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(VAT3M) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(VATBM) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(Netto22M)<> 0.0 or ADOCUR(Netto17M) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(Netto12M)<> 0.0 or ADOCUR(Netto7M)<> 0.0 or ADOCUR(NettoAM) <> 0.0 or _ ADOCUR(Netto3M) <> 0.0 or ADOCUR(Netto0M)<> 0.0 or ADOCUR(NettoZwM) _ )
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = nothing
if bOpodatkowana or bNieOpodatkowana then set pNOCU = pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,0,"EwidZakup",strKey) with pNOCU .field("strNrDok") = strKey .map_field "strNrDokObcy","NrDok" .field("eZwOpSprz") = clng(N5ZAKUP_TYPOPOD_OPODATK)
EwidZakup_Common pHandler,pADORS,pNOCU
.field("curVat22") = ADOCUR(VAT22S) + ADOCUR(VAT22O) .field("curVat17") = ADOCUR(VAT17S) + ADOCUR(VAT17O) .field("curVat12") = ADOCUR(VAT12S) + ADOCUR(VAT12O) .field("curVat7") = ADOCUR(VAT7S) + ADOCUR(VAT7O) .field("curVat4") = ADOCUR(VATAS) + ADOCUR(VATAO) .field("curVat3") = ADOCUR(VAT3S) + ADOCUR(VAT3O) .field("curVat2") = ADOCUR(VATBS) + ADOCUR(VATBO)
.field("curNetto22") = ADOCUR(Netto22S) + ADOCUR(Netto22O) .field("curNetto17") = ADOCUR(Netto17S) + ADOCUR(Netto17O) .field("curNetto12") = ADOCUR(Netto12S) + ADOCUR(Netto12O) .field("curNetto7") = ADOCUR(Netto7S) + ADOCUR(Netto7O) .field("curNetto4") = ADOCUR(NettoAS) + ADOCUR(NettoAO) .field("curNetto3") = ADOCUR(Netto3S) + ADOCUR(Netto3O) .field("curNetto2") = ADOCUR(NettoBS) + ADOCUR(NettoBO) .field("curNetto0") = ADOCUR(Netto0S) + ADOCUR(Netto0O) .field("curNettoZw") = ADOCUR(NettoZwS) + ADOCUR(NettoZwO) .field("curNettoNp") = ADOCUR(NettoNP) .done end with end if
if bMieszana then strKey = strKey + "/M" set pNOCU = pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,0,"EwidZakup",strKey) with pNOCU .field("strNrDok") = strKey .field("strNrDokObcy") = ADOSTR(NrDok) + "/M" .field("eZwOpSprz") = clng(N5ZAKUP_TYPOPOD_MIESZANE)
EwidZakup_Common pHandler,pADORS,pNOCU
.field("curVat22") = ADOCUR(VAT22M) .field("curVat17") = ADOCUR(VAT17M) .field("curVat12") = ADOCUR(VAT12M) .field("curVat7") = ADOCUR(VAT7M) .field("curVat4") = ADOCUR(VATAM) .field("curVat3") = ADOCUR(VAT3M) .field("curVat2") = ADOCUR(VATBM)
.field("curNetto22") = ADOCUR(Netto22M) .field("curNetto17") = ADOCUR(Netto17M) .field("curNetto12") = ADOCUR(Netto12M) .field("curNetto7") = ADOCUR(Netto7M) .field("curNetto4") = ADOCUR(NettoAM) .field("curNetto3") = ADOCUR(Netto3M) .field("curNetto2") = ADOCUR(NettoBM) .field("curNetto0") = ADOCUR(Netto0M) .field("curNettoZw") = ADOCUR(NettoZwM) .done end with end if
if not pNOCU is nothing then EwidZakup_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj else EwidZakup_Convert2NXD = clng(0) end if end function
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------------------ function EwidSprzedaz_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : EwidSprzedaz_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idDoc : idDoc = ADOLONG(IdDoc) dim strKey: strKey = left(ADOSTR(NrDok),29)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("EwidSprzedaz",strKey,EwidSprzedaz_Convert2NXD)
'--force dependency for RokKsieg-- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(ADODATE(DataWyst))
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = nothing
set pNOCU = pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,0,"EwidSprzedaz",strKey)
with pNOCU .field("strNrDok") = strKey .map_ref "pKlient","Kontrahent",ADOLONG(IdKontra),true
.map_field "dDataWyst","DataWyst" .map_field "dDataSprzed","DataSprz" .map_field "dDataPlat","DataPlat" .field("pUzytRej") = clng(SyntheticCurrentUser(pHandler)) .map_field "strUwagi","Uwagi"
dim strSymbolTrans strSymbolTrans = .field("strNrDok")
.field("pTransakcja") = clng(SyntheticTransakcja(pHandler, _ strSymbolTrans,.field("pKlient"),TYPEID_N5KLIENT,2))
dim nTypDow : nTypDow = ADOLONG(TypDow) dim nTypRejestru
'----------------------------- 'nie umiemy znaleźć powiązania dla korekty zakupu '----------------------------- nTypRejestru = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_SP)
.map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(nTypRejestru), _ eTypRejestru2Str(nTypRejestru),year(ADODATE(DataWyst)))),true
if ADOSTR(OznTran) <> "" then .field("pKwalifikatorEx") = clng(SyntheticKwalifikator(pHandler,ADOSTR(OznTran))) end if
.field("pSposobPlatnosci") = clng(SposPlat_Mapper(pHandler,"",ADODATE(DataPlat) - ADODATE(DataWyst)))
.field("pRozlVat") = clng(SyntheticRozlVAT(pHandler,.field("dDataWyst"),clng(SyntheticCurrentUser(pHandler)))) .null_ref "pPopSprzed" .null_ref "pFaktura" .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .mark_save_now
.field("curVat22") = ADOCUR(VAT22) .field("curVat17") = ADOCUR(VAT17) .field("curVat12") = ADOCUR(VAT12) .field("curVat7") = ADOCUR(VAT7) .field("curVat4") = ADOCUR(VATA) .field("curVat3") = ADOCUR(VAT3) .field("curVat2") = ADOCUR(VATB)
.field("curNetto22") = ADOCUR(Netto22) .field("curNetto17") = ADOCUR(Netto17) .field("curNetto12") = ADOCUR(Netto12) .field("curNetto7") = ADOCUR(Netto7) .field("curNetto4") = ADOCUR(NettoA) .field("curNetto3") = ADOCUR(Netto3) .field("curNetto2") = ADOCUR(NettoB) .field("curNetto0") = ADOCUR(Netto0K) + ADOCUR(Netto0Z) .field("curNettoZw") = ADOCUR(NettoZw) .field("curNettoNp") = ADOCUR(NettoNP) .done end with
EwidSprzedaz_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj end function
#comment '---------------------------------------
sub PozMagazynBO_Mapper(byref pNOCU,byref pADORS,byval curIlosc) with pNOCU .field("curIloscOpak") = ccur(curIlosc) .map_field "curCenaMag","cena" .map_field "curWartMag","wartosc" .map_ref "pProdukt","Artykul",ADOLONG(idart),true .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) end with end sub
function PozKasa_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : PozKasa_Convert2NXD = 0 dim strKey : strKey = cstr(ADOLONG(IdRapKas)) + "/" + cstr(ADOLONG(LP)) dim eTypTrans
dim pNOCUPozKasa : set pNOCUPozKasa = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,0,"PozKasa",strKey)
'--force dependency for RokKsieg -- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(ADODATE(DataPoz))
with pNOCUPozKasa .map_field "dDataOper","DataPoz" .field("strOpis") = "KP/KW:" + ADOSTR(NrKPKW) + " " + ADOSTR(Opis) .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .mark_begin_unit
.field("eStatus") = clng(N5PLATNOSC_ZREALIZOWANA) '__IG__ - łamanie przez id .field("strNrDok") = ADOSTR(kasa_nrdok) + "/" + strKey .map_ref "pUzytRej","NAVOUser",ADOLONG(IdUser),true
if ADOLONG(IdRej) > 0 then .map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",ADOLONG(IdRej),true else if ADOSTR(Status) = "K" then .map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(N5REJESTRDOK_KASOWY), _ eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK_KASOWY),year(ADODATE(DataPoz)))),true else .map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY), _ eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY),year(ADODATE(DataPoz)))),true end if end if
if ADOSTR(Status) = "K" then .field("plat_pRapKas") = clng(SyntheticRapKas(pHandler,.field("dDataOper"), .field("pUzytRej"), .field("pRejestrDok") , "RAPKAS" )) end if
if ADOSTR(Status) = "B" then .field("plat_pRapKas") = clng(SyntheticRapKas(pHandler,.field("dDataOper"), .field("pUzytRej"), .field("pRejestrDok") , "RAPBANK" )) end if
.field("curKwotaPodm") = ccur(ADOCUR(Przychod) - ADOCUR(Rozchod))
'czy naleznosc czy zoobowiazanie if ( ccur(ADOCUR(Przychod) - ADOCUR(Rozchod)) ) > 0 then 'naleznosc eTypTrans = clng(2) else 'zoobowiazanie eTypTrans = clng(1) end if
dim strRodzajOp : strRodzajOp = ADOSTR(RodzajOp) if strRodzajOp = "K" then .map_ref "wrefPodmiot","Kontrahent",ADOLONG(IdentOp),true .field("wrefPodmiot_wrt") = clng(TYPEID_N5KLIENT) else if strRodzajOp = "P" then .map_ref "wrefPodmiot","Pracownik",ADOLONG(IdentOp),true .field("wrefPodmiot_wrt") = clng(TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK) else if strRodzajOp = "U" then .map_ref "wrefPodmiot","Instytucja",ADOLONG(IdentOp),true .field("wrefPodmiot_wrt") = clng(TYPEID_N5INSTYTUCJA) else if trim(ADOSTR(Osoba)) = "" then .field("wrefPodmiot") = clng(0) .field("wrefPodmiot_wrt") = clng(TYPEID_N5FIRMA) .field("_wrefPodmiot_current_firma_") = clng(0) else .null_ref "wrefPodmiot" .field("wrefPodmiot_wrt") = clng(0) end if end if end if end if if .field("wrefPodmiot") = clng(0) and .field("wrefPodmiot_wrt") <> clng(TYPEID_N5FIRMA) then .field("wrefPodmiot_wrt") = clng(TYPEID_N5FIRMA) .field("_wrefPodmiot_current_firma_") = clng(0) .field("strOpis") = .field("strOpis") + " Uwaga! Brak podmiotu w NAVO Firma" end if end with
dim pNOCUPozPlatn : set pNOCUPozPlatn = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5POZPLATNOSC,0,"PozPlatn",strKey)
dim strSymbolTrans : strSymbolTrans = ADOSTR(poz_nrdok) if strSymbolTrans = "" then strSymbolTrans = ADOSTR(SymbTran) end if if strSymbolTrans = "" then strSymbolTrans = pNOCUPozKasa.field("strNrDok") end if if strSymbolTrans = "" then strSymbolTrans = "XXX/" + strKey end if
with pNOCUPozPlatn 'listPozycje .field("curPozKwotaTrans") = pNOCUPozKasa.field("curKwotaPodm") .field("curPozKwotaPodm") = pNOCUPozKasa.field("curKwotaPodm") .field("pTransakcja") = clng(SyntheticTransakcja(pHandler, _ strSymbolTrans,pNOCUPozKasa.field("wrefPodmiot"), _ pNOCUPozKasa.field("wrefPodmiot_wrt"),eTypTrans))
.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,pNOCUPozKasa.idobj,"listPozycje",1 .mark_as_last_child .mark_save_now .mark_end_unit .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) pNOCUPozKasa.done
.done end with
PozKasa_Convert2NXD = pNOCUPozKasa.idobj end function
#comment '----------------------------------------------------------- #comment '----------------------------------------------------------- ' UWAGA!!!! Przy poprawkach nalezy poprawic tez funkcje GenerateKasaBankBO_FullFK sub GenerateKasaBankBO_KPIR(byref pHandler,idFirma,dtDateStan)
' w KPIR nie filtrujemy po bieżącym roku oraz nie ma rejestró - stąd filtrowanie idrej = 0 'w GenerateKasaBankBO_FullFK filtrujemy po roku - i tworzymy BO dla rejestrów dim strQuery : strQuery = _ "select 'idrej'=k.idrej, 'saldo'=sum(pk.przychod-pk.rozchod),'nazwarej'=(select nazwa from rejestr rej where rej.idrej = k.idrej) , 'status'=pk.status " +_ " from pozkasa pk join kasa k on pk.idrapkas=k.idrapkas " +_ "where k.idrej=0 and k.idfirma=" + cstr(idFirma) + " and pk.datapoz <= " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dtDateStan) + "group by k.idrej , pk.Status having sum(pk.przychod-pk.rozchod) <> 0.0" dim pADORS : set pADORS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(strQuery)
dim eTypTrans dim bOK:bOK = false
if pADORS.EOF then exit sub end if
do while not pADORS.EOF
bOK = true
dim strKey : strKey = cstr(ADOLONG(idrej)) + "/BO"
dim pNOCUPozKasa : set pNOCUPozKasa = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,0,"PozKasa",strKey)
'--force dependency for RokKsieg -- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(dtDateStan+1)
with pNOCUPozKasa .field("dDataOper") = dtDateStan .field("strOpis") = "BO" .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .mark_begin_unit
.field("eStatus") = clng(N5PLATNOSC_ZREALIZOWANA)
if ADOSTR(Status) = "K" then .field("strNrDok") = "BO/KASA/" + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(dtDateStan) .map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(N5REJESTRDOK_KASOWY), _ eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK_KASOWY),year(dtDateStan))),true else .field("strNrDok") = "BO/BANK/" + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(dtDateStan) .map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY), _ eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY),year(dtDateStan))),true end if
.field("pUzytRej") = clng(SyntheticCurrentUser(pHandler)) .field("curKwotaPodm") = ccur(ADOCUR(Saldo))
'czy naleznosc czy zoobowiazanie if ( ccur(ADOCUR(Saldo)) ) > 0 then 'naleznosc eTypTrans = clng(2) else 'zoobowiazanie eTypTrans = clng(1) end if
.field("wrefPodmiot_wrt") = clng(TYPEID_N5FIRMA) .field("wrefPodmiot") = clng(0) .field("_wrefPodmiot_current_firma_") = clng(0) end with
dim pNOCUPozPlatn : set pNOCUPozPlatn = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5POZPLATNOSC,0,"PozPlatn",strKey)
dim strSymbolTrans : strSymbolTrans = pNOCUPozKasa.field("strNrDok")
with pNOCUPozPlatn 'listPozycje .field("curPozKwotaTrans") = pNOCUPozKasa.field("curKwotaPodm") .field("curPozKwotaPodm") = pNOCUPozKasa.field("curKwotaPodm") .field("pTransakcja") = clng(SyntheticTransakcja(pHandler, _ strSymbolTrans,pNOCUPozKasa.field("wrefPodmiot"), _ pNOCUPozKasa.field("wrefPodmiot_wrt"),eTypTrans))
.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,pNOCUPozKasa.idobj,"listPozycje",1 .mark_as_last_child .mark_save_now .mark_end_unit .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) pNOCUPozKasa.done
.done end with
pADORS.MoveNext if pHandler.is_error() then exit sub end if loop
if not bOK then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "Nie wygenerowany BO - zerowa roznica przychodu i rozchodu)" end if
end sub
#comment '----------------------------------------------------------- #comment '----------------------------------------------------------- ' UWAGA!!!! Przy poprawkach nalezy poprawic tez funkcje GenerateKasaBankBO_KPIR sub GenerateKasaBankBO_FullFK(byref pHandler,idFirma,dtDateStan)
dim strQuery : strQuery = _ "select 'idrej'=k.idrej, 'saldo'=sum(pk.przychod-pk.rozchod),'nazwarej'=(select nazwa from rejestr rej where rej.idrej = k.idrej) , 'status'=pk.status " +_ " from pozkasa pk join kasa k on pk.idrapkas=k.idrapkas " +_ "where k.idrej<>0 and year(pk.datapoz)=" + cstr(year(dtDateStan)) + " and k.idfirma=" + cstr(idFirma) + " and pk.datapoz <= " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dtDateStan) + "group by k.idrej , pk.Status having sum(pk.przychod-pk.rozchod) <> 0.0" dim pADORS : set pADORS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(strQuery)
dim eTypTrans dim bOK:bOK = false
if pADORS.EOF then exit sub end if
do while not pADORS.EOF
bOK = true
dim strKey : strKey = cstr(ADOLONG(idrej)) + "/BO"
dim pNOCUPozKasa : set pNOCUPozKasa = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,0,"PozKasa",strKey)
'--force dependency for RokKsieg -- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(dtDateStan+1)
with pNOCUPozKasa .field("dDataOper") = dtDateStan .field("strOpis") = "BO" .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .mark_begin_unit
.field("eStatus") = clng(N5PLATNOSC_ZREALIZOWANA)
.field("strNrDok") = "BO " + cstr(ADOSTR(nazwarej)) .map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",ADOLONG(IdRej),true .field("pUzytRej") = clng(SyntheticCurrentUser(pHandler)) .field("curKwotaPodm") = ccur(ADOCUR(Saldo))
'czy naleznosc czy zoobowiazanie if ( ccur(ADOCUR(Saldo)) ) > 0 then 'naleznosc eTypTrans = clng(2) else 'zoobowiazanie eTypTrans = clng(1) end if
.field("wrefPodmiot_wrt") = clng(TYPEID_N5FIRMA) .field("wrefPodmiot") = clng(0) .field("_wrefPodmiot_current_firma_") = clng(0) end with
dim pNOCUPozPlatn : set pNOCUPozPlatn = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5POZPLATNOSC,0,"PozPlatn",strKey)
dim strSymbolTrans : strSymbolTrans = pNOCUPozKasa.field("strNrDok")
with pNOCUPozPlatn 'listPozycje .field("curPozKwotaTrans") = pNOCUPozKasa.field("curKwotaPodm") .field("curPozKwotaPodm") = pNOCUPozKasa.field("curKwotaPodm") .field("pTransakcja") = clng(SyntheticTransakcja(pHandler, _ strSymbolTrans,pNOCUPozKasa.field("wrefPodmiot"), _ pNOCUPozKasa.field("wrefPodmiot_wrt"),eTypTrans))
.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,pNOCUPozKasa.idobj,"listPozycje",1 .mark_as_last_child .mark_save_now .mark_end_unit .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) pNOCUPozKasa.done
.done end with
pADORS.MoveNext if pHandler.is_error() then exit sub end if loop
if not bOK then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "Nie wygenerowany BO - zerowa roznica przychodu i rozchodu)" end if
end sub
#comment '-----------------------------------------------------------
function GenerateMagazynBO(byref pHandler,idFirma,dtDateStan) GenerateMagazynBO = false
dim strLastMagazyn : strLastMagazyn = "" dim nNr dim strNFTTList : strNFTTList = "'A','C','E','K','O','I','U'"
dim strQuery : strQuery = _ "select 'idmag'=pr.idmag,'magazyn'=max(m.nazwa),'idart'=pr.idart,'ilosc'=sum(pr.ilosc),'cena'=pr.cenaz, " +_ "'wartosc'=sum(convert(decimal(15,2),pr.ilosc*pr.cenaz)),'inxart'=max(a.naszinx) from przyroz pr " +_ "join magazyn m on m.idmagazyn = pr.idmag join artykul a on a.idart = pr.idart " +_ "where a.idfirmy = " + cstr(idFirma) + " and pr.lp < 0 and datapr <= " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dtDateStan) + " and a.towarusl='t' " +_ "group by pr.idmag, pr.idart, pr.cenaz " if pHandler.get_source().connection_type = 1 then 'CONNTYPE_MSSQL strQuery = strQuery + ",case when pr.typtran in(" + strNFTTList + ") then pr.idpr else pr.idprorg end" else strQuery = strQuery + ",if pr.typtran in(" + strNFTTList + ") then pr.idpr else pr.idprorg endif" end if
strQuery = strQuery + " having sum(pr.ilosc) <> 0 order by max(m.nazwa), max(a.nazwa),"
if pHandler.get_source().connection_type = 1 then 'CONNTYPE_MSSQL strQuery = strQuery + " max(case when pr.typtran in (" + strNFTTList + ") then pr.idpr else pr.idprorg end)" else strQuery = strQuery + " max(if pr.typtran in (" + strNFTTList + ") then pr.idpr else pr.idprorg endif)" end if
dim pPerforming : set pPerforming = doc_.performing("Trwa analiza danych...")
dim pADORS : set pADORS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(strQuery) dim nLP : nLP = 1 dim idDokMag
set pPerforming = nothing
do while not pADORS.EOF dim strMagazyn : strMagazyn = ADOSTR(Magazyn) dim curIlosc : curIlosc = ADOCUR(ilosc) if curIlosc < ccur(0.0) then nx_.trace.error "EIM001", "Wykryto ujemną ilość (" + cstr(curIlosc) + ") towaru o indeksie " + ADOSTR(inxart) + " w magazynie " + strMagazyn + _ ". Kontynuuję import, przyjmuję zastępczo ilość 0.01" curIlosc = ccur(0.01) end if if strMagazyn <> strLastMagazyn then strLastMagazyn = strMagazyn 'rozpoczęcie nowego magazynu
dim pNOCUDokMag : set pNOCUDokMag = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,0,"BOMagazyn",strMagazyn) with pNOCUDokMag .map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(N5REJESTRDOK__PW), _ eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK__PW),year(dtDateStan))),true .map_ref "pMagDocel","Magazyn",ADOLONG(idmag),true .field("strNrDok") = "BO/" + strMagazyn .field("pUzytRej") = clng(SyntheticCurrentUser(pHandler)) .field("dDataWyst") = dtDateStan .done end with nLP = 1 idDokMag = pNOCUDokMag.idobj end if
dim pNOCUPDM : set pNOCUPDM = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5POZDOKMAG,0,"PozBOMagazyn",pNOCUDokMag.idobj)
PozMagazynBO_Mapper pNOCUPDM,pADORS,curIlosc
pADORS.MoveNext
pNOCUPDM.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,pNOCUDokMag.idobj,"listPozycje",nLP
if pADORS.EOF then pNOCUPDM.mark_as_last_child else if strLastMagazyn <> ADOSTR(Magazyn) then pNOCUPDM.mark_as_last_child end if end if
pNOCUPDM.done
nLP = nLP + 1 if pHandler.is_error() then exit function end if loop
GenerateMagazynBO = true end function
sub Dekret_Mapper2(byref pNOCU,byref pADORS) dim curWn : curWn = ADOCUR(KwotaWn) dim curMa : curMa = ADOCUR(KwotaMa)
if curWn > curMa then curWn = curWn - curMa curMa = ccur(0.0) else curMa = curMa - curWn curWn = ccur(0.0) end if
with pNOCU .field("curWn") = curWn .field("curMa") = curMa
.map_field "strOpis","Opis" .map_ref "pKonto","Konto",ADOLONG(IdKonto),true end with end sub
sub GenerateKontoBO(byref pHandler,idFirma,dtDateStan,byval bMerge)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG,0,"BOPolecenie",0)
with pNOCU .field("dDataRej") = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) '------ nie ustawiamy daty niech ustawi się sama ' .field("dDataKsieg") = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) .field("strNrDok") = "" .field("_choose_rejestr_dok_") = clng(N5REJESTRDOK_DZIENNIK_BO) .field("pUzytRej") = clng(SyntheticCurrentUser(pHandler)) .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .mark_begin_unit .done end with
#comment '---------- dekrety ------------------- dim pPerforming : set pPerforming = doc_.performing("Trwa analiza danych...")
'--- query ma zwracać: idkonto, kwotawn, kwotama, opis
dim strQuery if bMerge then strQuery = _ "select K.idkonto,max(k.symbol),'kwotawn'=min(saldootwwn)+isnull((select sum(kwotawn) from dekret d " +_ " where d.idkonto=k.idkonto and d.dataksieg <=" + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dtDateStan) + "),0)," +_ "'kwotama'=min(saldootwma)+isnull((select sum(kwotama) from dekret d " +_ "where d.idkonto=k.idkonto and d.dataksieg <=" + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dtDateStan) + "),0), " +_ "'opis'='BO' from konto K where K.IdFirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) + " and K.Syntet='A' and K.rok=" + cstr(year(dtDateStan)) +_ " group by K.idkonto " +_ " order by 2,1" else strQuery = _ "select K.idkonto,max(k.symbol),'kwotawn'=sum(kwotawn),'kwotama'=sum(kwotama),'opis'=D.symbtran " +_ "from dekret D join konto K on D.idkonto = K.idkonto " +_ "where K.IdFirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) + " and K.Syntet='A' and K.rok=" + cstr(year(dtDateStan)) +_ " and D.dataksieg <= " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dtDateStan) +_ " group by K.idkonto,D.symbtran " +_ " having sum(kwotawn) <> sum(kwotama) " +_ " union all select K.idkonto,max(k.symbol),'kwotawn'=min(saldootwwn),'kwotama'=min(saldootwma),'opis'='BO'" +_ "from konto K where K.IdFirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) + " and K.Syntet='A' and K.rok=" + cstr(year(dtDateStan)) +_ " group by K.idkonto " +_ " having min(saldootwwn) <> min(saldootwma)" +_ " order by 2" end if
dim pDekretRS : set pDekretRS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(strQuery)
dim iter : iter = 1 set pPerforming = nothing
dim pNOCUDekr : set pNOCUDekr = nothing
do while not pDekretRS.EOF dim curWn,curMa curWn = ccur(pDekretRS("kwotawn")) curMa = ccur(pDekretRS("kwotama"))
'-- konieczne filtrowanie na dekrety <> 0.0 bo się nie wczyta!!
if (curWn <> 0.0 or curMa <> 0.0) and curWn <> curMa then if not pNOCUDekr is nothing then pNOCUDekr.done end if set pNOCUDekr = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pDekretRS,TYPEID_N5DEKRET,0,"Dekret",cstr(pNOCU.idobj) + ";" + cstr(iter))
Dekret_Mapper2 pNOCUDekr,pDekretRS
