pNOCUDekr.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG,pNOCU.idobj,"listDekret",iter pNOCUDekr.field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) iter = iter + 1 end if
pDekretRS.MoveNext if pHandler.is_error() then exit sub end if loop
if not pNOCUDekr is nothing then pNOCUDekr.mark_as_last_child pNOCUDekr.mark_save_now pNOCUDekr.mark_end_unit pNOCUDekr.done end if
end sub
function get_PozKasa_Query_Base(byval strCondition) dim strSQL strSQL = "select *,'kasa_nrdok'=k.nrdok,'poz_nrdok'=pk.nrdok,'poz_id_rapkas'=pk.IdRapKas,'poz_lp'=pk.LP from kasa k join pozkasa pk on k.idrapkas = pk.idrapkas where (Przychod <> Rozchod) " if strCondition <> "" then strSQL = strSQL + " and (" + strCondition + ") " end if strSQL = strSQL + " order by datapoz,sign(przychod-rozchod) desc,lp" get_PozKasa_Query_Base = strSQL end function
#comment '----------------------------------------------------------- sub GenerateTransactionBO(byref pHandler,idFirma,dtDateStan) dim dtDateStanOld : dtDateStanOld = DateAdd("yyyy",-2,dtDateStan)
dim strQuery if pHandler.get_source().connection_type = 1 then 'CONNTYPE_MSSQL strQuery = _ "select 'idkontra'=rs.idkontra,'kinx'=max(k.indeks),'kwotawn'=sum(kwotawn),'kwotama'=sum(kwotama),'dataplat'=max(dataplat) " +_ "from rozrachsp rs join kontrahent k on k.idkontra=rs.idkontra where idfirmy= " + cstr(idFirma) +_ " and DataOper between " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dtDateStanOld) + " and " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dtDateStan) + _ " group by rs.idkontra having sum(kwotawn) <> sum(kwotama)" else 'sybase strQuery = _ "select 'idkontra'=rs.idkontra,'kinx'=max(k.indeks),'kwotawn'=sum(kwotawn),'kwotama'=sum(kwotama),'dataplat'=max(dataplat) " +_ "from rozrachsp rs join kontrahent k on k.idkontra=rs.idkontra where idfirmy= " + cstr(idFirma) +_ " and DataOper between " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dtDateStanOld) + " and " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dtDateStan) + _ " group by rs.idkontra having kwotawn <> kwotama" end if
dim pADORS : set pADORS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(strQuery) do while not pADORS.EOF dim strSymbTrans : strSymbTrans = "BO/" + ADOSTR(kinx) dim nDummy, nDummy2
if not pHandler.getmapping("Transakcja",strSymbTrans,nDummy,nDummy2) then dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA,0,"Transakcja",strSymbTrans)
with pNOCU .field("strSymTrans") = strSymbTrans .map_ref "wrefPodmiot","Kontrahent",ADOLONG(idkontra),true .map_field "curWn","kwotawn" .map_field "curMa","kwotama" .map_field "curWnEwid","kwotawn" .map_field "curMaEwid","kwotama"
'znacznik odblokowujacy zapis do tych pól .field("_assign_wn_ma_") = clng(1)
.field("dDataRozp") = dtDateStan .map_field "dDataWym","dataplat" if ADOCUR(kwotawn) > ADOCUR(kwotama) then .field("eTyp") = clng(N5TRANSAKCJA_NALEZNOSC) else .field("eTyp") = clng(N5TRANSAKCJA_ZOBOWIAZANIE) end if .field("wrefPodmiot_wrt") = clng(TYPEID_N5KLIENT) .mark_save_now .done end with end if
pADORS.MoveNext if pHandler.is_error() then exit sub end if loop end sub
function KPIRWpis_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,pADORS) : KPIRWpis_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idPozKsiega : idPozKsiega = ADOLONG(IdPozKsiega)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("KPIRWpis",idPozKsiega,KPIRWpis_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5PKPIR,idPozKsiega,"KPIRWpis",idPozKsiega) with pNOCU 'nNumOper - AUTO lub LP .map_field "dDataOper","DataPoz" .map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(N5REJESTRDOK_PKPIR), _ eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK_PKPIR),year(ADODATE(DataPoz)))),true .map_field "strNrDok","NrDow" .map_ref "pKlient","Kontrahent",ADOLONG(IdKontra),true .map_field "strOpis","Opis" .map_field "strUwagi","Uwagi" .map_field "curWartSprzed","Kol7" .map_field "curPozPrzych","Kol8" .map_field "curZakTow","Kol10" .map_field "curKosztZak","Kol11" .map_field "curKosztRekl","Kol13" .map_field "curWynagrodz","Kol14" .map_field "curPozWyd","Kol15" .map_field "curKol16","Kol17"
'pkpir_wrefDokZrodl
.done end with
KPIRWpis_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj end function #comment '----------------------------------------------------------- #comment '-----------------------------------------------------------
function Firma_GetObjectRS(byref pHandler,strSrcType,varKey) : set Firma_GetObjectRS = nothing dim strQuery : strQuery = ""
select case strSrcType case "Artykul" strQuery = "select * from Artykul where idArt=" + cstr(varKey) case "Recepta" strQuery = "select * from Recepta where idRecepta=" + cstr(varKey) case "Srtrw" strQuery = "select * from stobj where idsrodka=" + cstr(varKey) case "GrupaArt" strQuery = "select * from GrupaArt where idGrArt=" + cstr(varKey) case "GrupaKontra" strQuery = "select * from GrupaKontra where idGrKontra=" + cstr(varKey) case "Jednostka" strQuery = "select * from Jednostka where IdJedn=" + cstr(varKey) case "Konto" strQuery = _ "select *,'idkontra'=isnull((select idkontra from kontrakonto kk where kk.idkonto=k.idkonto),0)," +_ "'idprac'=isnull((select idprac from pracownikkonto pk where pk.idkonto=k.idkonto),0)" +_ " from Konto k where IdKonto=" + cstr(varKey) case "Kontrahent" '__IG__ - nie przenosi się limit kontrahentra
'sql if pHandler.get_source().connection_type = 1 then 'CONNTYPE_MSSQL strQuery = "select *,'id_kontra'=Kontrahent.IdKontra,'id_gr_kontra'=isnull(IdGrKontra,0),'txt_opis'=isnull(Opis,''),'cur_lk'=isnull(1000000,0)," +_ "'txt_dtnumer'=isnull(DTNumer,''),'txt_dtdatawyst'=isnull(DTDataWyst,''),'txt_dtorgan'=isnull(DTOrgan,'') " +_ " from Kontrahent left outer join KontraSprz KS on " +_ " Kontrahent.IdKontra = KS.IdKontra where Kontrahent.IdKontra=" + cstr(varKey) else 'sybase strQuery = "select *,'id_kontra'=Kontrahent.IdKontra,'id_gr_kontra'=isnull(IdGrKontra,0),'txt_opis'=isnull(Opis,''),'cur_lk'=isnull(1000000,0)," +_ "'txt_dtnumer'=isnull(DTNumer,''),'txt_dtdatawyst'= CONVERT(DATETIME, isnull(DTDataWyst, CONVERT(DATETIME, '1899-12-31', 111) ) , 111 ),'txt_dtorgan'=isnull(DTOrgan,'') " +_ " from Kontrahent left outer join KontraSprz KS on " +_ " Kontrahent.IdKontra = KS.IdKontra where Kontrahent.IdKontra=" + cstr(varKey) end if
case "Kraj" strQuery = "select * from Kraj where IdKraj=" + cstr(varKey) case "Magazyn" strQuery = "select * from Magazyn where IdMagazyn=" + cstr(varKey) case "NAVOUser" strQuery = "select * from NAVOUser where IdUser=" + cstr(varKey) case "Polecenie" strQuery = "select * from Polecenie where IdPolec=" + cstr(varKey) case "KPIRWpis" strQuery = "select * from PozKPIR where IdPozKsiega=" + cstr(varKey) case "Pracownik" strQuery = "select * from Pracownik where IdPrac=" + cstr(varKey) case "RejPol" strQuery = "select * from RejPol where IdRejPol=" + cstr(varKey) case "Sprzedaz" strQuery = "select * from Sprzedaz where IdTrans=" + cstr(varKey) case "Paragon" strQuery = "select * from rw_pw where IdTrans=" + cstr(varKey) case "EwidSprzedaz" strQuery = "select * from EwidSprzedazVAT where IdDoc=" + cstr(varKey) case "Zakup" strQuery = "select * from Zakup where IdTrans=" + cstr(varKey) case "EwidZakup" strQuery = "select * from EwidZakupVAT where IdDoc=" + cstr(varKey) case "Rejestr" strQuery = "select * from Rejestr where IdRej=" + cstr(varKey) case "Instytucja" strQuery = "select * from Urzad where IdUrzad=" + cstr(varKey) case "DokMagSP" strQuery = "select 'id_trans'=Dok.IdTrans,* from Sprzedaz as Dok join PozSprzedaz as Poz on Dok.IdTrans = Poz.IdTrans " +_ "join Artykul A on Poz.IdArt = A.IdArt where (Poz.Ilosc > 0.0 or Dok.IdTransOrgi <> 0) and A.TowarUsl='T' and Dok.IdTrans=" + cstr(varKey) + " order by IdMag,Poz.LP" case "DokMagZA" strQuery = "select 'id_trans'=Dok.IdTrans,* from Zakup as Dok join PozZakup as Poz on Dok.IdTrans = Poz.IdTrans " +_ "join Artykul A on Poz.IdArt = A.IdArt where (Poz.Ilosc > 0.0 or Dok.IdTransOrgi <> 0) and A.TowarUsl='T' and Dok.IdTrans=" + cstr(varKey) + " order by IdMag,Poz.LP" case "DokMagMM" strQuery = "select 'id_trans'=Dok.IdTrans,* from PrzesMM as Dok join PozMM as Poz on Dok.IdTrans = Poz.IdTrans " +_ "join Artykul A on Poz.IdArt = A.IdArt where Poz.Ilosc > 0.0 and A.TowarUsl='T' and Dok.IdTrans=" + cstr(varKey) + " order by Poz.LP" case "DokMagRP" strQuery = "select 'id_trans'=Dok.IdTrans,* from RW_PW as Dok join PozRW_PW as Poz on Dok.IdTrans = Poz.IdTrans " +_ "join Artykul A on Poz.IdArt = A.IdArt where Poz.Ilosc > 0.0 and A.TowarUsl='T' and Dok.IdTrans=" + cstr(varKey) + " order by IdMag,Poz.LP" case "RokKsieg" strQuery = "select * from RokKsieg where Rok=" + cstr(varKey) end select
dim pADORS : set pADORS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(strQuery) if pADORS is nothing then exit function end if if pADORS.EOF then exit function end if set Firma_GetObjectRS = pADORS end function
function Firma_ImportObject(byref pHandler,byval strSrcType,byval varKey) : Firma_ImportObject = 0 dim pADORS : set pADORS = Firma_GetObjectRS(pHandler,strSrcType,varKey) if pADORS is nothing then exit function end if
select case strSrcType case "Artykul" Firma_ImportObject = Artykul_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "GrupaArt" Firma_ImportObject = GrupaArt_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "GrupaKontra" Firma_ImportObject = GrupaKontra_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Jednostka" Firma_ImportObject = Jednostka_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Konto" Firma_ImportObject = Konto_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Kontrahent" Firma_ImportObject = Kontrahent_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Kraj" Firma_ImportObject = Kraj_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Magazyn" Firma_ImportObject = Magazyn_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "NAVOUser" Firma_ImportObject = NAVOUser_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Polecenie" Firma_ImportObject = Polecenie_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "KPIRWpis" Firma_ImportObject = KPIRWpis_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Pracownik" Firma_ImportObject = Pracownik_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "RejPol" Firma_ImportObject = RejPol_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Sprzedaz" Firma_ImportObject = Sprzedaz_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Paragon" Firma_ImportObject = Paragon_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "EwidSprzedaz" Firma_ImportObject = EwidSprzedaz_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Zakup" Firma_ImportObject = Zakup_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "EwidZakup" Firma_ImportObject = EwidZakup_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Rejestr" Firma_ImportObject = Rejestr_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Instytucja" Firma_ImportObject = Urzad_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "DokMagSP" Firma_ImportObject = DokMagSP_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "DokMagZA" Firma_ImportObject = DokMagZA_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "DokMagMM" Firma_ImportObject = DokMagMM_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "DokMagRP" Firma_ImportObject = DokMagRP_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "RokKsieg" Firma_ImportObject = RokKsieg_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Recepta" Firma_ImportObject = Recepta_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) case "Srtrw" Firma_ImportObject = Srtrw_Convert2NXD(pHandler,pADORS) end select
end function
#comment '----------------------------------------------------------- #comment '----------------------------------------------------------- public function choose_firma(byref pForeignConnection): choose_firma = clng(0)
dim pNewHli set pNewHli=doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_FORM_CHOICE_FIRMA_IMP")
dim pUserPage set pUserPage=doc_.getpagehli(pNewHli)
if (pUserPage is nothing) then exit function end if
dim nRes : nRes = pUserPage.read_firmy(pForeignConnection.connection)
select case nRes case -100 'Wiecej firm choose_firma = pUserPage.domodalauto() case -200 'Rezygnacja exit function case else choose_firma = CLng(nRes) end select
end function
private function sqllike(byval strValue) sqllike = replace(replace(trans_.afc.convert.DoubleApostrophe(strValue),"*","%"),"?","_") end function
function do_import(byref pForeignConnection,byref oNFIO) : do_import = false dim pHM : set pHM = doc_.getmodule(60213) dim pH : set pH = pHM.new_ado2nxd_handler()
dim pM60211 : set pM60211 = doc_.getmodule(60211) dim pImportHolder : set pImportHolder = pM60211.new_import_nxd_2_EB_holder()
dim pSO : set pSO = doc_.createstreamobj() ' pSO.attach "c:\from_firma3.nxd" pH.set_importer pImportHolder.get_handler() pImportHolder.get_handler().updateexisting = (oNFIO.m_bUpdateExisting = "1") pH.required_init pForeignConnection,getref("Firma_ImportObject")
pH.start_export2stream pSO,1,"Import z NAVO Firma: " + oNFIO.description()
dim idFirma : idFirma = choose_firma(pForeignConnection) if idFirma <= 0 then exit function end if
dim pADORS if oNFIO.m_bCustomers <> "0" then set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute("select IdKontra from Kontrahent where IdFirma=" + cstr(idFirma) + " order by Nazwa") do while not pADORS.EOF Firma_ImportObject pH,"Kontrahent",pADORS("idkontra") if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if
if oNFIO.m_bProducts <> "0" then set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute("select idart from Artykul where IdFirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) + " order by Nazwa") do while not pADORS.EOF Firma_ImportObject pH,"Artykul",pADORS("idart") if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if
if oNFIO.m_bReceipt <> "0" then set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute("select idrecepta from Recepta where IdFirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) + " order by Nazwa") do while not pADORS.EOF Firma_ImportObject pH,"Recepta",pADORS("idrecepta") if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if
if oNFIO.m_bSrtrw <> "0" then set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute("select idsrodka from stobj where IdFirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) + " order by Nazwa") do while not pADORS.EOF Firma_ImportObject pH,"Srtrw",pADORS("idsrodka") if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if
if oNFIO.m_bEmployee <> "0" then set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute("select idprac from Pracownik where IdFirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) + " order by Nazwisko") do while not pADORS.EOF Firma_ImportObject pH,"Pracownik",pADORS("idprac") if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if
if oNFIO.m_bStoreBalance <> "0" then if not GenerateMagazynBO(pH,idFirma,oNFIO.m_dStoreBalanceDate) then exit function end if end if
if oNFIO.m_bStoreOp <> "0" then dim idLastTrans : idLastTrans = clng(0)
dim pPerformingPrzyroz : set pPerformingPrzyroz = doc_.performing("Trwa analiza danych...") set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute( _ "select TypTran,idtrans from naprawa_pr np join artykul a on a.idart = np.idart " +_ "where a.towarusl='t' and np.datapr between " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dStoreOpBeginDate) + " and " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dStoreOpEndDate) +_ " and a.idfirmy = " + cstr(idFirma) + _ " order by DataPR,kwal,IdTrans,LP,TypTran") set pPerformingPrzyroz = nothing
do while not pADORS.EOF dim idTrans : idTrans = clng(pADORS("idtrans")) if idTrans <> idLastTrans then idLastTrans = idTrans dim cTypTran : cTypTran = cstr(pADORS("TypTran"))
select case cTypTran case "M","O","R" Firma_ImportObject pH,"DokMagSP",idTrans case "G","I","J","K" Firma_ImportObject pH,"DokMagMM",idTrans case "A","E","W" Firma_ImportObject pH,"DokMagZA",idTrans case "C","D","N","U","T" Firma_ImportObject pH,"DokMagRP",idTrans end select end if if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if
if oNFIO.m_bSale <> "0" then set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute("select idtrans from sprzedaz where datawyst between " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dSaleBeginDate) + " and " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dSaleEndDate) + "and rtrim(NrDok) <> '' and idfirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) +_ " order by datawyst,idtrans") do while not pADORS.EOF Firma_ImportObject pH,"Sprzedaz",pADORS("idtrans") if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if
if oNFIO.m_bPar <> "0" then set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute("select idtrans from rw_pw where dataop between " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dParBeginDate) + " and " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dParEndDate) + "and rtrim(NrDok) <> '' and Typ = 'U' and idfirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) +_ " order by dataop,idtrans") do while not pADORS.EOF Firma_ImportObject pH,"Paragon",pADORS("idtrans") if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if
if false then set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute("select iddoc from EwidSprzedazVAT where datawyst between " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dSaleBeginDate) + " and " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dSaleEndDate) + " and idfirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) +_ " order by datawyst,iddoc")
do while not pADORS.EOF Firma_ImportObject pH,"EwidSprzedaz",pADORS("iddoc") if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if
if oNFIO.m_bPurchase <> "0" then set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute("select idtrans from zakup where datawyst between " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_bPurchaseBeginDate) + " and " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_bPurchaseEndDate) + " and idfirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) +_ " order by datawyst,idtrans")
do while not pADORS.EOF Firma_ImportObject pH,"Zakup",pADORS("idtrans") if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if
if oNFIO.m_bCostPurch <> "0" then set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute("select iddoc from ewidzakupvat where datawyst between " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dCostPurchBeginDate) + " and " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dCostPurchEndDate) + " and idfirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) +_ " order by datawyst,iddoc")
do while not pADORS.EOF Firma_ImportObject pH,"EwidZakup",pADORS("iddoc") if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if
if oNFIO.m_bPaymentsBalance <> "0" then GenerateKasaBankBO_KPIR pH,idFirma,oNFIO.m_dPaymentsBalanceDate GenerateKasaBankBO_FullFK pH,idFirma,oNFIO.m_dPaymentsBalanceDate end if
if oNFIO.m_bPayments <> "0" then set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute( get_PozKasa_Query_Base("DataPoz between " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dPaymentsBeginDate) + " and " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dPaymentsEndDate) + " and k.idfirma=" + cstr(idFirma))) do while not pADORS.EOF PozKasa_Convert2NXD pH,pADORS if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if
#ifdef APPCONFIG_PKPIR if oNFIO.m_bAccountOp <> "0" then set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute( _ "select IdPozKsiega from PozKPIR join KPIRMain on PozKPIR.iddoc = KPIRMain.iddoc where IdFirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) + " and DataPoz between " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dAccountOpBeginDate) + " and " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dAccountOpEndDate) + " order by IdPozKsiega,DataPoz,lp") do while not pADORS.EOF Firma_ImportObject pH,"KPIRWpis",pADORS("IdPozKsiega") if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if #else if oNFIO.m_bAccountBalance <> "0" then trans_.var(VARCTXT_KONTO_EANALIT) = clng(N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE) GenerateKontoBO pH,idFirma,oNFIO.m_dAccountBalanceDate,(oNFIO.m_bAccountBalanceMerge = "1") end if
if oNFIO.m_bAccountOp <> "0" then trans_.var(VARCTXT_KONTO_EANALIT) = clng(N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE) set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute( _ "select idpolec from polecenie where IdFirmy=" + cstr(idFirma) + " and DataKsieg between " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dAccountOpBeginDate) + " and " +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(oNFIO.m_dAccountOpEndDate) + " order by idrejpol,dataksieg,nrpolec") do while not pADORS.EOF Firma_ImportObject pH,"Polecenie",pADORS("idpolec") if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if #endif
#ifndef APPCONFIG_PKPIR if oNFIO.m_bAccounts <> "0" then trans_.var(VARCTXT_KONTO_EANALIT) = clng(N5KONTO_ANALITYCZNE)
if trim(oNFIO.m_strAccounts) = "" then oNFIO.m_strAccounts = "*" end if
set pADORS = pForeignConnection.connection.execute("select idkonto from konto where Symbol like '" +_ sqllike(oNFIO.m_strAccounts) + "' and Syntet='A' and Rok=" + cstr(year(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY))) +_ " and idfirmy=" + cstr(idFirma)) do while not pADORS.EOF Firma_ImportObject pH,"Konto",pADORS("idkonto") if pH.is_error() then exit function end if pADORS.movenext loop end if #endif
if oNFIO.m_bTransactionBalance <> "0" then GenerateTransactionBO pH,idFirma,oNFIO.m_dTransactionBalanceDate end if
pH.stop_export do_import = true end function
function Recepta_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Recepta_Convert2NXD = 0
dim idRecepta : idRecepta = ADOLONG(IdRecepta)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Recepta",idRecepta,Recepta_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5RECEPTA,idRecepta,"Recepta",idRecepta)
with pNOCU .map_field "strNazwa","Nazwa" .map_field "strNorma","Norma" .map_field "strOpis","Opis" .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0)
.field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .mark_begin_unit .done
end with
dim pNOCUPoz : set pNOCUPoz = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5POZRECEPTA,idRecepta,"ReceptaPozycjaWyrob",pNOCU.idobj)
with pNOCUPoz
.map_ref "pProdukt","Artykul",ADOLONG(IdArt),true .map_field "curIloscOpak","Ilosc" .mark_as_child TYPEID_N5RECEPTA,pNOCU.idobj,"listWyrob",1 .mark_as_last_child .mark_end_unit .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0)
end with
#comment ' ************* surowce ****************** dim pPozReceptaSurRS : set pPozReceptaSurRS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(_ "select * from PozRecepta where IdRecepta=" + cstr(idRecepta) + " and TypPoz='T' order by LP")
dim iter : iter = 1 do while not pPozReceptaSurRS.EOF dim pNOCUSur : set pNOCUSur = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pPozReceptaSurRS,TYPEID_N5POZRECEPTA,0,"PozRecepta",cstr(pNOCU.idobj) + ";" + cstr(iter))
PozRecepta_Mapper pNOCUSur , pPozReceptaSurRS
pPozReceptaSurRS.MoveNext pNOCUSur.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5RECEPTA,pNOCU.idobj,"listSurowce",iter
if pPozReceptaSurRS.EOF then pNOCUSur.mark_as_last_child pNOCUSur.mark_save_now end if
pNOCUSur.done iter = iter + 1 if pHandler.is_error() then exit function end if loop
dim pPozReceptaCzRS : set pPozReceptaCzRS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(_ "select * from PozRecepta where IdRecepta=" + cstr(idRecepta) + " and TypPoz='U' order by LP")
iter = 1 do while not pPozReceptaCzRS.EOF dim pNOCUCz : set pNOCUCz = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pPozReceptaCzRS,TYPEID_N5POZRECEPTA,0,"PozRecepta",cstr(pNOCU.idobj) + ";" + cstr(iter))
PozRecepta_Mapper pNOCUCz , pPozReceptaCzRS
pPozReceptaCzRS.MoveNext pNOCUCz.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5RECEPTA,pNOCU.idobj,"listCzynnosci",iter
if pPozReceptaCzRS.EOF then pNOCUCz.mark_as_last_child pNOCUCz.mark_save_now end if
pNOCUCz.done iter = iter + 1 if pHandler.is_error() then exit function end if loop
end function
function PozRecepta_Mapper(byref pNOCU,byref pADORS) with pNOCU .field("curIloscOpak") = ADOCUR(ilosc) + ADOCUR(StrNaZlecIlosc) .map_ref "pProdukt","Artykul",ADOLONG(IdTowRec),true .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) end with end function
function Srtrw_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Srtrw_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idSrodka : idSrodka = ADOLONG(idSrodka)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Srtrw",idSrodka,Srtrw_Convert2NXD)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5SRTRW,idSrodka,"Srtrw",idSrodka)
with pNOCU .map_field "strNazwa","Nazwa" .map_field "strNumEwid","NumerEwid" .map_field "strNumSer","Nr_ser" .map_field "strKRST","SymbolKRST"
.map_field "curStawkaPod","StawkaPod" .map_field "curStawkaBil","StawkaBil"
.field("eRodzaj") = clng(pADORS.fields("TypSrodek").value + 1) .field("pGrupa") = clng(SyntheticGrupaSrtrw(pHandler))
.mark_save_now
if pHandler.get_level() > 1 then .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) end if
.done end with
Srtrw_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj end function
function SyntheticGrupaSrtrw(byref pHandler)
dim strGrupaSrtrw:strGrupaSrtrw = "importowana"
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("GrupaSrtrw",strGrupaSrtrw,SyntheticGrupaSrtrw)
dim pNOCUGrupaSrtrw : set pNOCUGrupaSrtrw = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5GRUPASRTRW,0,"GrupaSrtrw",strGrupaSrtrw)
with pNOCUGrupaSrtrw .field("strNazwa") = strGrupaSrtrw .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
SyntheticGrupaSrtrw = pNOCUGrupaSrtrw.idobj end function
function Paragon_Convert2NXD(byref pHandler,byref pADORS) : Paragon_Convert2NXD = 0 dim idPar : idPar = ADOLONG(IdTrans)
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Paragon",idPar,Paragon_Convert2NXD)
'--force dependency for RokKsieg -- pHandler.get_ref_id "RokKsieg",year(ADODATE(DataOp))
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pADORS,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,idPar,"Paragon",idPar)
with pNOCU .map_field "strNrDok","NrDok"
if clng(pADORS("IdKontra").value) = 0 then .field("pKlient") = clng(SyntheticKontra(pHandler,"detal")) else .map_ref "pKlient","Kontrahent",ADOLONG(IdKontra),true end if
.map_field "dDataWyst","DataOp" .map_field "dDataSprzed","DataOp" .map_ref "pUzytRej","NAVOUser",ADOLONG(IdUser),true .map_field "strUwagi","Opis" .field("eNettoBrutto") = clng(N5SPRZEDAZ_BRUTTO) .field("eSposVAT") = clng(N5SPRZEDAZ_VAT_STAWKI)
.field("pTransakcja") = clng(SyntheticTransakcja(pHandler, _ .field("strNrDok"),.field("pKlient"),TYPEID_N5KLIENT,2))
.map_ref "pRejestrDok","Rejestr",clng(SyntheticRejestr(pHandler,clng(N5REJESTRDOK_PARAGON), _ eTypRejestru2Str(N5REJESTRDOK_PARAGON),year(ADODATE(DataOp)))),true .null_ref "pPopSprzed"
if ADOSTR(OznTran) <> "" then .field("pKwalifikatorEx") = clng(SyntheticKwalifikator(pHandler,ADOSTR(OznTran))) end if
.field("pSposobPlatnosci") = clng(SposPlat_Mapper(pHandler,"gotówka", clng(0)))
dim idMappedUser: idMappedUser = pHandler.get_ref_id("NAVOUser",ADOLONG(IdUser))
.field("pRozlVat") = clng(SyntheticRozlVAT(pHandler,.field("dDataWyst"),idMappedUser)) .field("_with_recalc") = clng(0) .done end with
Paragon_Convert2NXD = pNOCU.idobj
#comment '---------- pozycje sprzedaży -------------------
dim pPozParagonRS : set pPozParagonRS = pHandler.get_source().connection.execute(_ "select * from PozRW_PW where IdTrans=" + cstr(idPar) + " order by LP") dim iter : iter = 1 do while not pPozParagonRS.EOF dim pNOCUPoz : set pNOCUPoz = _ pHandler.new_nocu(pPozParagonRS,TYPEID_N5POZSPRZEDAZ,0,"PozSprzedaz",cstr(pNOCU.idobj) + ";" + cstr(iter))
PozParagon_Mapper pNOCUPoz,pPozParagonRS
pPozParagonRS.MoveNext pNOCUPoz.mark_as_child TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,pNOCU.idobj,"listPozycje",iter
if pPozParagonRS.EOF then pNOCUPoz.mark_as_last_child pNOCUPoz.mark_save_now end if
pNOCUPoz.done iter = iter + 1 if pHandler.is_error() then exit function end if loop
end function
function SyntheticKontra(byref pHandler,byval strName) : SyntheticKontra = 0
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("Kontrahent",1,SyntheticKontra)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5KLIENT,1,"Kontrahent",1)
with pNOCU
.field("strNazwa") = strName .field("strSkrot") = strName .field("strIndeks") = strName .field("ePrywat") = clng(2)
.map_ref "pGrupaKlient","GrupaKontra",clng(SyntheticGrupaKontra(pHandler)),true .field("pMiejscowosc") = clng(SyntheticMiejscowosc(pHandler,"","")) .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
SyntheticKontra = clng(1) end function
#include "50523"
function SyntheticRapKas(byref pHandler,byval dDataOper,byref idMappedUser , byval idRej , byval strFormat)
dim dDataOd, dDataDo compute_dates_for_rapkas 3 , dDataOper , dDataOd , dDataDo
CHECK_ALREADY_WAS("RapKas",cstr(dDataOd) + cstr(idRej) ,SyntheticRapKas)
dim pNOCU : set pNOCU = _ pHandler.new_nocu(nothing,TYPEID_N5RAPKAS , 0 ,"RapKas",cstr(dDataOd)) with pNOCU .field("raka_strNrDok") = strFormat + " " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(dDataOd) + "/" + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(dDataDo) .field("raka_dDataOd") = dDataOd .field("raka_dDataDo") = dDataDo .field("raka_pUzytRej") = idMappedUser .field("raka_pRejestrDok") = clng(idRej) .field("_enter_sub") = clng(0) .field("_leave_sub") = clng(0) .mark_save_now end with
SyntheticRapKas = pNOCU.idobj end function
